Brand Bible品牌聖經 / Brand Foundation
Chapter 01 — Foundation第 01 章——基礎
Brand Foundation品牌基礎
Owner: GPS Strategy & DX · Approver: GPS Director核准：GPS Director

Core Belief核心信念

"When people feel genuinely safe — not just at work, but across their whole lives — they are free to focus, create, and contribute at their highest level."「當人們感到真正的安全——不僅僅是在工作中，而是貫穿他們的整個生活——他們才能自由地專注、創造，並以最高水準做出貢獻。」

This belief is GPS's commitment — the reason this strategy exists. Everything we communicate, every tool we propose, every change we introduce must trace back to it. It is not a slogan. It is the standard against which every decision is measured.

這份信念是 GPS 的承諾——也是這項策略存在的理由。我們所溝通的一切、提出的每一個工具、引入的每一項變革，都必須回溯到這個核心。這不是口號，而是衡量每一個決策的標準。

Narrative Architecture敘事架構

To honour that commitment, all change streams — AI adoption, brand transformation, operational evolution — must be narrated through a single coherent arc, not run as separate campaigns. A unified narrative reduces cognitive load, builds cumulative meaning, and gives every initiative a clear place in a larger story.

為了實踐這份承諾，所有變革脈絡——AI 導入、品牌轉型、營運優化——都必須透過一個統一的敘事弧線來講述，而非各自為營。統一的敘事降低認知負擔、累積意義，讓每個倡議都在更大的故事中找到明確的位置。

We define two phases as our near-term direction. Beyond that, the strategy does not end — it iterates. Stakeholder feedback gathered at the close of each phase shapes the next: its priorities, its narrative emphasis, and its channel mix.

我們定義兩個階段作為近期方向。此後，策略不會終結——它會持續迭代。每個階段結束時收集的利害關係人回饋，將形塑下一階段的優先順序、敘事重點和通路組合。

Brand Purpose品牌目的

To transform physical security from a compliance function into a human-centered enabling force — making safety invisible, intuitive, and deeply personal across every site where our people work.

將實體安全從一個合規功能，轉型為以人為本的賦能力量——讓安全在每一個工作場域中成為無形、直覺且深度個人化的存在。

Brand Mission品牌使命

Protect the world's most advanced semiconductor operations and the people within them by designing security systems that are precise, adaptive, and grounded in care.

守護全球最先進的半導體營運體系及其中的每一個人，透過設計精準、靈活且根植於關懷的安全系統。

Brand Vision品牌願景

A world where security is not felt as restriction but experienced as freedom — where every person entering our sites carries the confidence that their safety has been designed in advance.

一個安全不被感受為限制，而是被體驗為自由的世界——每一個進入我們場域的人，都帶著「安全已被提前設計好」的信心。

Five Brand Pillars五大品牌支柱

Designed Safety設計安全
Security by design, not afterthought安全從設計開始，而非事後補救
Journey Protection旅途保護
From home to site to home從家到廠、從廠到家
Family Extension家庭延伸
Safety travels home with you安全跟你一起回家
Living Culture活的文化
Safety as collective identity安全作為集體認同
Transparent Technology透明科技
Technology serving people visibly科技可見地服務於人

Phased Narrative Arc階段性敘事弧線

Phase 1 · 2026第一階段 · 2026

"We're changing how safety feels"「我們正在改變安全的感受」

Challenge the assumption that security means restriction. Introduce new tools and ideas as expressions of care and support — for staff, for families, for the whole person. Establish a shared language across all sites.挑戰「安全等於限制」的假設。引入新工具和理念作為關懷與支持的表達——為員工、為家庭、為完整的人。在所有場域建立共享的語言。

Phase 2 · 2027第二階段 · 2027

"Safety becomes who we are"「安全成為我們的身份」

Transition from awareness to identity. GPS values are internalized by managers and reflected in day-to-day decisions — not only in formal communications. Cross-site communities of practice emerge.從認知轉化為認同。GPS 價值觀被管理者內化，並反映在日常決策中——不僅限於正式溝通。跨場域的實踐社群逐漸形成。

Beyond Phase 2 — Continuous Iteration第二階段之後——持續迭代

Each phase closes with a structured review of stakeholder feedback — from security managers, site operations, partner functions, and contracted personnel. What we learn shapes the next phase: its priorities, its narrative emphasis, and its channel mix. The strategy improves because the people it serves inform it.每個階段結束時，進行利害關係人回饋的結構化檢視——來自安全管理人員、場域營運、合作部門和承攬商保全。我們學到的將形塑下一階段：其優先順序、敘事重點和通路組合。策略之所以進步，是因為它服務的人在引導它。

Philosophical Foundation哲學基底

CPTED — Crime Prevention Through Environmental Design. GPS's approach is rooted in designing environments that inherently reduce risk rather than relying solely on enforcement. This philosophy informs our visual language: open sightlines, natural surveillance, and environments that feel welcoming because they are secure.

CPTED——環境設計犯罪預防。GPS 的方法植根於設計本身就能降低風險的環境，而非僅仰賴執法。這一哲學影響了我們的視覺語言：開放的視線、自然的監控，以及因安全而感覺親切的環境。

Chapter 02 — Foundation第 02 章——基礎
Brand Behaviors品牌行為準則
Owner: GPS Strategy & DX · Approver: GPS Director核准：GPS Director

Brand behaviors define how GPS people act — observable actions that any colleague or visitor should recognize within the first 10 minutes at a GPS-managed site.

品牌行為定義了 GPS 人如何行動——這些是可觀察的行為，任何同事或訪客應該在進入 GPS 管理場域的最初 10 分鐘內就能識別出來。

Behavior 01行為 01
Explain Before Enforce先說明，後執行
Every security procedure has a reason. We communicate the "why" before enforcing the "what."每一項安全程序都有其理由。我們在執行「做什麼」之前，先溝通「為什麼」。
Behavior 02行為 02
Greet First, Verify Second先問候，再驗證
Human acknowledgment precedes security protocol. A greeting before badge verification signals we protect people, not perimeters.先以人的方式致意，再進行安全協議。在查驗門禁前先問候，表明我們保護的是人，不是圍牆。
Behavior 03行為 03
Design for the Uncomfortable Moment為不適時刻而設計
Security encounters are asymmetric. We proactively minimize discomfort, wait time, and ambiguity.安全互動本質上是不對等的。我們主動最小化不適感、等待時間和模糊感。
Behavior 04行為 04
Share What We Know分享所知
Safety knowledge is not proprietary. When GPS learns something that protects someone's family or commute — we share it.安全知識不是專屬情報。當 GPS 學到能保護某人家庭或通勤安全的知識——我們分享它。
Behavior 05 — Foundation行為 05——基礎
Treat Every Site as Someone's First Day視每個場域為某人的第一天
New hires, visitors, and transferred employees experience GPS before any other function. We are the first impression. Every interaction should meet the standard we would want for our own first day.新進人員、訪客和調派員工在接觸其他任何部門之前，最先體驗到的就是 GPS。我們是第一印象。每一次互動都應符合我們對自己第一天的期望標準。

Measurement衡量方式

Quarterly mystery visitor assessments, biannual safety perception survey (5 questions), and front-line supervisor peer reviews during shift handovers. Results feed into Brand Performance Metrics (Section 24).

季度神秘訪客評估、半年度安全感知調查（5 題）、以及換班交接時的第一線主管同儕評鑑。結果回饋至品牌績效指標（第 24 章）。

Chapter 03 — Visual Identity第 03 章——視覺識別
Logo System標誌系統
Owner:負責： MarCom Team

The GPS logo mark is a checkerboard-derived pattern of dots arranged in a spherical projection — representing precision, global interconnection, and the grid-based monitoring systems at the core of physical security. Paired with bilingual text lockup, it forms the primary visual anchor of the brand.

GPS 標誌圖標是源自棋盤格的圓點組成球面投影——代表精確、全球互聯，以及實體安全核心的網格監控系統。搭配雙語文字（全球實體安全處 / GLOBAL PHYSICAL SECURITY），形成品牌的主要視覺錨點。

Logo Mark標誌圖標

Mark — Standard標準標誌
Mark — Reversed反白標誌

Construction Grid結構網格

The logo mark is generated from a spherical grid with concentric radial zones. Dots increase in size and density toward the equator, creating the characteristic asymmetric sweep. Understanding this grid is essential for co-branded layouts and custom applications at non-standard aspect ratios.

標誌圖標由同心放射狀區域的球面網格生成。圓點朝赤道方向逐漸增大、密度增加，形成特有的不對稱弧形。理解此網格對於聯合品牌排版和非標準長寬比的自訂應用至關重要。

Grid Rules網格規則
Zone區域Dot Size圓點尺寸Opacity不透明度
1 (Apex)1（頂端）1–2px20–40%
2 (Transition)2（過渡）3–5px50–80%
3 (Equator)3（赤道）6–8px80–100%
4 (Taper)4（漸收）4–6px40–70%
Note: This is a structural reference. Production logo files maintain exact dot coordinates from the master Figma source.備註：此為結構參考。正式標誌檔案使用 Figma 主檔的精確圓點座標。

Horizontal Lockup水平組合標誌

The horizontal lockup is the default and primary choice for most applications.

水平組合標誌是大多數應用場景的預設和首選。

Chinese Main · Light BG中文主標 · 淺色背景
全球實體安全處
Global Physical Security
Chinese Main · Dark BG中文主標 · 深色背景
全球實體安全處
Global Physical Security

English Main — Horizontal英文主標——水平

English Main · Light BG英文主標 · 淺色背景
GLOBAL
PHYSICAL
SECURITY
全球實體安全處
English Main · Dark BG英文主標 · 深色背景
GLOBAL
PHYSICAL
SECURITY
全球實體安全處

Vertical Lockup垂直組合標誌

Use when horizontal space is limited. The vertical lockup stacks the mark above the bilingual text.

當水平空間有限時使用。垂直組合標誌將圖標堆疊在雙語文字之上。

Chinese Main — Vertical中文主標——垂直

Vertical · CN · Light垂直 · 中文 · 淺色
全球實體安全處
Global Physical Security
Vertical · CN · Dark垂直 · 中文 · 深色
全球實體安全處
Global Physical Security

English Main — Vertical英文主標——垂直

Vertical · EN · Light垂直 · 英文 · 淺色
GLOBAL
PHYSICAL
SECURITY
全球實體安全處
Vertical · EN · Dark垂直 · 英文 · 深色
GLOBAL
PHYSICAL
SECURITY
全球實體安全處
Production note:製作備註：The SVG renderings above are structural approximations. For production use, source official vector files (SVG / EPS / AI) from the GPS shared drive. Both Chinese Main and English Main lockups are equally valid — select based on the primary audience language.以上 SVG 為結構性近似圖。正式製作時，請從 GPS 共用磁碟取用官方向量檔（SVG / EPS / AI）。中文主標和英文主標兩種組合同等有效——依受眾主要語言選擇。

Logo Lockups — Specifications標誌組合——規格

Horizontal Lockup is the default and primary choice for most use cases. If space is limited, use the secondary vertical logos. The logo mark alone can be used where space is very limited, such as web clip or favicon. Each lockup exists in Chinese Main Lockup and English Main Lockup variants — both are equally valid. Select based on the audience's primary language.

水平組合標誌是大多數使用場景的預設和首選。空間有限時使用垂直組合。標誌圖標可在極小空間（如網頁圖示或 favicon）單獨使用。每種組合都有中文主標和英文主標兩種變體——兩者同等有效，依受眾主要語言選擇。

Lockup組合Usage用途Standard Min Height標準最小高度Below Min低於最小值Optical Min光學最小值
Horizontal logoDefault, primary choice36px / 10mmuse optical28px / 8mm
Vertical (tall)Limited horizontal space160px / 40mmuse horizontal optical—
Vertical (wide)Wider vertical containers120px / 35mmuse horizontal optical—
Vertical (compact)Minimal footprint100px / 28mmuse horizontal optical—
Logo MarkFavicon, web clip, profile36px / 10mmuse optical20px / 5mm

mm: for print size / px: for digital size. Minimums ensure no strokes fall below 0.3pt — the threshold below which fine details fail to reproduce reliably.

Lockup Proportions比例標注

Internal spacing between the mark and text is defined proportionally to the mark dimensions (a = mark width, b = mark height), ensuring consistent appearance at any scale.

圖標與文字之間的內部間距，以圖標尺寸的比例定義（a = 圖標寬度，b = 圖標高度），確保在任何縮放比例下都呈現一致的外觀。

Lockup組合Mark-Text Gap圖標-文字間距Top頂部Bottom底部Sides側邊
Horizontal — CN/EN1/7a1/7a1/7a1/7a · 1/6b
Vertical — CN (small)1/6ba1/6ba
Vertical — EN (wide)1/6ba1/6b · c11/7a · 2/7a
Vertical — CN (tall)1/4aa1/2ab · 1/4a

Clearspace安全空間

Always keep a minimum amount of clear space around the logo — free from text, graphics, and other elements. This minimum clearspace scales with the size of the logo mark and should never be reduced.

始終在標誌周圍保留最低安全空間——遠離文字、圖形及其他元素。此最小安全空間隨標誌圖標尺寸等比縮放，不得減少。

Lockup組合Clearspace Rule安全空間規則Notation標注
Horizontal logo1/4 of the logo mark size on all sides標誌圖標尺寸的 1/4（四邊）1/2a top · 1/2b bottom · a sides
Vertical logo1/2 of the logo mark width on all sides標誌圖標寬度的 1/2（四邊）1/2a top · b bottom · 1/2b sides
Logo mark1/2 of the mark's own width on all sides圖標自身寬度的 1/2（四邊）1/2a all directions

Scalability尺寸規範

The logo was designed and tested to work at various sizes. Never use the logo smaller than the minimum sizes defined above. Below the standard minimum, an optical version of the logo is available with adjusted stroke weights and spacing to preserve legibility. Vertical lockups fall back to the horizontal optical logo at smaller scales.

標誌經設計和測試，可在各種尺寸下正常使用。永遠不要以小於上述最低尺寸使用標誌。低於標準最小值時，可使用經調整筆畫粗細和間距的光學版本，以維持清晰度。垂直組合在較小尺寸時改用水平光學版本。

36px
Horizontal min水平最小
28px
Optical min光學最小
36
Mark min圖標最小
20
Mark optical圖標光學
160px
Vert. tall垂直（高）

Logo Misuse標誌誤用

The appearance of the logo must remain consistent. It should not be reinterpreted, modified, or embellished. No attempt should be made to alter the logo in any way.

標誌的外觀必須保持一致。不得重新詮釋、修改或美化。任何人不得以任何方式改動標誌。

Misuse 01誤用 01
Do not resize the mark不可重新調整圖標尺寸
The mark and logotype must always scale together proportionally. Never enlarge or shrink the mark independently of the text.圖標和標誌文字必須始終等比縮放。永遠不要獨立於文字單獨放大或縮小圖標。
Misuse 02誤用 02
Do not rotate the logo不可旋轉標誌
The logo must always appear in its standard upright orientation. No angular rotation is permitted.標誌必須始終以標準直立方向呈現。不允許任何角度旋轉。
Misuse 03誤用 03
Do not change the color of the mark alone不可單獨更改圖標顏色
The mark and text must share the same color treatment. Do not recolor the globe independently.圖標和文字必須共用相同的色彩處理。不要單獨更改球體顏色。
Misuse 04誤用 04
Do not outline the logo不可將標誌轉為外框
The logo uses solid fills. Do not convert to outline, add strokes, or apply border effects.標誌使用實心填充。不要轉為外框、添加筆畫或套用邊框效果。
Misuse 05誤用 05
Do not add gradients to the logotype不可對標誌文字添加漸層
The gradient belongs to brand surfaces, not the logotype itself. Keep the text portion single-color.漸層屬於品牌表面，而非標誌文字本身。保持文字部分為單一顏色。
Misuse 06誤用 06
Do not stretch or manipulate不可拉伸或變形
Never distort, warp, squeeze, or disproportionately scale the logo. Maintain exact aspect ratios at all times.永遠不要扭曲、變形、壓縮或不等比縮放標誌。任何時候都要維持精確的長寬比。

Logo Clarity標誌清晰度

When creating a composition, it is important to have enough contrast between background and logo to maximize legibility.

在製作構圖時，確保背景與標誌之間有足夠的對比度以最大化清晰度至關重要。

正確Use the standard color logo on clean, light backgrounds. Use the white (reversed) logo on solid dark backgrounds. Ensure the background provides sufficient contrast — light solids, subtle gradients, or clear photographic areas all work.在乾淨的淺色背景上使用標準彩色標誌。在深色背景上使用白色（反白）標誌。確保背景提供足夠的對比——淺色單色、柔和漸層或乾淨的攝影區域皆可。
禁止Do not place the standard logo on same-tone colored backgrounds where contrast is insufficient. Do not place the reversed logo on busy, detailed, or low-contrast photographic backgrounds where the mark becomes illegible.不要將標準標誌放在對比不足的同色調背景上。不要將反白標誌放在繁忙、細節過多或低對比度的攝影背景上，這會使標誌難以辨識。
Chapter 04 — Visual Identity第 04 章——視覺識別
Master Color Palette主色調系統
Owner:負責： MarCom Team

Primary Colors主色

The turquoise-to-copper gradient is GPS's signature identity. Turquoise conveys trust and modernity; copper adds warmth and composure — together expressing secure, human-centered global operations.

青綠色至銅色漸層是 GPS 的標誌性視覺識別。青綠色傳達信任與現代感；銅色增添溫暖與沉穩——兩者共同表達安全、以人為本的全球營運精神。

Turquoise
#26A7B0
C75 M23 Y37 K0
PMS 7466 C

Color Ratio色彩比例

30–80%
10–60%
10–60%
Primary / Image主色 / 影像
Neutral中性色
Secondary輔助色
Role角色Ratio比例Application應用
Primary30–80%Hero backgrounds, key visuals, brand surfaces主視覺背景、關鍵視覺、品牌表面
Neutral10–60%Body backgrounds, card surfaces, text containers內文背景、卡片表面、文字容器
Secondary10–60%Thematic accents, data categories, campaigns主題點綴、數據分類、宣傳活動

Color Application色彩應用

正確Use neutral colors as base and highlight with the primary gradient. Use primary colors as base and balance with neutral tones. Use secondary colors to create alternative gradients that serve as thematic accents.以中性色為底，以主漸層做強調。以主色為底，以中性色調平衡。使用輔助色創建作為主題點綴的替代漸層。
禁止Do not overuse colors or skip neutral balance. Do not color logos or type arbitrarily without ensuring contrast between background and type. Do not use harsh neon tones or visually jarring combinations. Do not apply random rainbows or unbalanced color blocks.不要過度使用色彩或忽略中性色平衡。不要任意為標誌或文字上色而未確保背景與文字的對比。不要使用刺眼的霓虹色或視覺不協調的組合。不要使用隨意的彩虹色或不平衡的色塊。
Pantone note: PMS values are pending formal sign-off — currently nearest coated-stock matches. GPS Director must approve final PMS designation against physical chip comparison before these are considered locked. For uncoated stock, use the corresponding U series.Pantone 備註：PMS 值為待正式簽核——目前為最接近的銅版紙匹配。GPS Director 須以實體色片比對後核准最終 PMS 指定值，方可視為鎖定。非銅版紙請使用對應 U 系列。
Chapter 05 — Visual Identity第 05 章——視覺識別
Tint & Shade Scales色調漸變階梯
Owner:負責： MarCom Team

Each brand color expands into an 11-step scale (50→950) for consistent UI, charts, and data visualization.

每種品牌色彩擴展為 11 階色階（50→950），用於一致的 UI、圖表和數據視覺化。

Turquoise

50#F0FAFB

950#082A30

950#2B2433

50#F4F6FB

50#FEF6F2
100#FDE8DE

300#F6AD90
400#F29068

800#87381B
900#642A15

Scale Usage Guide色階使用指南

The 50–950 range serves different purposes. Lighter tints (50–200) for backgrounds and surfaces. Mid-range (300–500) for interactive elements and accents. Dark shades (600–950) for text and high-contrast elements.

50–950 範圍服務不同用途。淡色（50–200）用於背景和表面。中間色（300–500）用於互動元素和點綴。深色（600–950）用於文字和高對比元素。

Range範圍Purpose用途Examples範例
50–100Page backgrounds, card surfaces, subtle fills頁面背景、卡片表面、細微填充Turquoise-50 for section BG, Copper-100 for hover statesTurquoise-50 區段背景，Copper-100 懸停狀態
200–300Borders, dividers, disabled states, tint panels邊框、分隔線、停用狀態、淡色面板Turquoise-200 for card borders, Green-300 for chart fillsTurquoise-200 卡片邊框，Green-300 圖表填充
400–500Primary brand surfaces, buttons, active states主要品牌表面、按鈕、活動狀態Turquoise-500 for CTA buttons, Copper-400 for secondaryTurquoise-500 行動按鈕，Copper-400 次要按鈕
600–700Text on light BG, dark accents, headers淺色背景文字、深色點綴、標題Turquoise-700 for body links, Purple-600 for AA-safe textTurquoise-700 內文連結，Purple-600 符合 AA 的文字
800–950Near-black text, dark mode surfaces, high-contrast近黑色文字、深色模式表面、高對比Turquoise-900 for dark hero BG, Copper-950 for near-blackTurquoise-900 深色主視覺背景，Copper-950 近黑色
Chart & data visualization: Use the 300–600 range across different hues for data categories. Turquoise-400 for primary series, Purple-400 for secondary, Green-400 for tertiary. Avoid combining adjacent hues at the same tint step — they'll be indistinguishable.圖表與數據視覺化：跨不同色相使用 300–600 範圍作為數據分類。Turquoise-400 主要系列，Purple-400 次要，Green-400 第三。避免在同一色階步驟組合相鄰色相——它們將難以區分。
Chapter 06 — Visual Identity第 06 章——視覺識別
Gradient Library漸層色庫
Owner:負責： MarCom Team

Primary主要漸層

Signature標誌漸層135° #26A7B0 → #CAC3D2

Vertical Descent垂直下降180°

Atmospheric (Mesh)氛圍（Mesh）漸層

Atmospheric Light氛圍淺色Hero sections, event backgrounds
Atmospheric Dark氛圍深色Dark mode heroes, video overlays

Owner:負責： MarCom Team

Pillar支柱Color色彩Tint BG淡色背景

Dark Mode深色模式

GPS Dark Mode — Live Preview

Soft white on deep blue-black. Turquoise-400 accent provides contrast without glare.

深藍黑底上的柔和白色。Turquoise-400 點綴色提供對比而不刺眼。

Token代符Light淺色Dark深色Role角色
--bg#F4F5F7#0D1B21Page background頁面背景
--surface#FFFFFF#142229Cards, panels卡片、面板
--border#E2E6EA#243944Dividers分隔線
--text#1A2A32#E2E8ECBody text內文
--text-muted#6B7B85#8A9BA5Secondary text次要文字
--accent#26A7B0#3DB9C2Interactive互動元素
Chapter 08 — Visual Identity第 08 章——視覺識別
Accessibility Pairings無障礙色彩配對
Owner:負責： MarCom Team

Every color combination must meet WCAG 2.1 AA: 4.5:1 for normal text, 3:1 for large text (≥18px bold or ≥24px).

每種色彩組合必須符合 WCAG 2.1 AA：一般文字 4.5:1，大型文字（≥18px 粗體或 ≥24px）3:1。

Light Mode淺色模式

Body on White
16.2:1 AAA
Turquoise-600
4.8:1 AA
White on Black
16.2:1 AAA
Black on Turquoise
5.1:1 AA
T-700 on T-50
6.4:1 AA

Dark Mode深色模式

Body on Dark
12.8:1 AAA
Accent on Surface
5.6:1 AA
Forbidden:禁止：White on Turquoise-500 for body (3.2:1 fails AA). White on Copper-300 (2.1:1 fails all). Purple-400 on White (3.0:1 — use Purple-600).Turquoise-500 上的白色內文（3.2:1 不符合 AA）。Copper-300 上的白色（2.1:1 全不符合）。白色上的 Purple-400（3.0:1——改用 Purple-600）。

Color Pairing Matrix色彩配對矩陣

Every foreground/background combination must meet WCAG 2.1 AA. This matrix shows contrast ratios for the most common pairings. Green = passes AA (≥4.5:1). Yellow = large text only (≥3:1). Red = fails.

每種前景/背景組合必須符合 WCAG 2.1 AA。此矩陣顯示最常見配對的對比度。綠色 = 符合 AA（≥4.5:1）。黃色 = 僅限大型文字（≥3:1）。紅色 = 不符合。

FG \ BG前景 \ 背景WhiteGrey-50Turq-50Turq-500BlackCopper
Black #0A1A2216.8 ✓15.2 ✓15.7 ✓4.7 ✓1.0 ✗9.2 ✓
Ink #1A2A3214.1 ✓12.8 ✓13.2 ✓4.0 △1.2 ✗7.7 ✓
Turq-600 #1E8A925.1 ✓4.6 ✓4.7 ✓1.6 ✗3.3 △3.0 △
Turq-500 #26A7B03.6 △3.2 △3.3 △1.0 ✗4.7 ✓2.2 ✗
White #FFFFFF1.0 ✗1.1 ✗1.1 ✗3.6 △16.8 ✓1.8 ✗
Purple-600 #5B6FA34.8 ✓4.5 ✓4.6 ✓1.5 ✗3.5 △2.7 ✗
Rule of thumb: Use Turquoise-600+ or Black for text on light backgrounds. Use White for text on Turquoise-500+ or Black backgrounds. Never use Turquoise-500 or Copper as text color on light backgrounds — contrast is insufficient.經驗法則：淺色背景上的文字使用 Turquoise-600+ 或黑色。Turquoise-500+ 或黑色背景上使用白色文字。切勿在淺色背景上以 Turquoise-500 或 Copper 作為文字色——對比度不足。
Chapter 09 — Visual Identity第 09 章——視覺識別
Typography字體排版
Owner:負責： MarCom Team
Role角色Typeface字體Weights字重
ChineseNoto Sans TCLight 300 · Regular 400 · Medium 500 · Bold 700
EnglishLatoLight 300 · Regular 400 · Bold 700
FallbackTrebuchet MS, VerdanaRegular · Bold

Type Specimen字體樣本頁

Designed for people, not just perimeters
為人而設計，不只是為界線
H2 · Section Heading · Lato Bold 20px
H2 · 區段標題 · Noto Sans TC Bold 20px
H3 · Subsection · Lato Bold 15px
H3 · 子標題 · Noto Sans TC Medium 15px
Body text in Lato Regular 14px. Security is not about restriction — it is about creating the conditions for people to focus, create, and contribute at their highest level.
內文使用 Noto Sans TC Regular 14px。安全不是限制——而是為人創造專注、創造和發揮最高水準的條件。CJK 行高 1.85。
Caption · Lato Regular 11px · Grey 500 · metadata, labels, supporting text
說明文字 · Noto Sans TC Regular 11px · Grey 500 · 後設資料、標籤、輔助文字

Type Specimen — Dark Mode字體樣本頁——深色模式

Safety designed into every surface
安全設計融入每一個介面
H2 · Section Heading · Turquoise-300 on DM-BG
H2 · 區段標題 · Turquoise-300 深色模式
Body text in Lato Regular on dark background. Use DM-Text (#E2E8EC) for primary text and DM-TextMuted (#8A9BA5) for secondary content. Never use pure white — it creates excessive contrast.
深色背景上的 Noto Sans TC 內文。主要文字使用 DM-Text (#E2E8EC)，次要內容使用 DM-TextMuted (#8A9BA5)。永不使用純白——會造成過度對比。
Caption · DM-TextMuted (#8A9BA5) · metadata, timestamps, secondary labels

Type Scale字級系統

Level層級Size尺寸Weight字重Line-Height行高
Display32–48pxBold 7001.15
Heading24–28pxBold 7001.25
Subheading18–20pxMedium 5001.35
Body14–16pxRegular 4001.65
Caption11–12pxRegular 4001.5

Max 3 type sizes per piece. CJK line-height: 1.8–2.0 (governs when mixed with Latin).

每件作品最多使用 3 種字級。中文行高：1.8–2.0（中英文混排時以此為準）。

Type Hierarchy字體層級

In order to keep things simple, no more than three type sizes should be used in one communication piece. Follow spacing and alignment structure. Use approved heading/subheading/body text sizes to maintain readability and hierarchy.

為保持簡潔，每件通訊作品不應使用超過三種字級。遵循間距和對齊結構，使用核定的標題/副標題/內文字級以維持可讀性和層級。

English Example英文範例
GLOBAL PHYSICAL SECURITY
Safeguarding TSMC's Global Operations, Site by Site
Global Physical Security (GPS) is the division responsible for maintaining physical safety, risk control, and operational resilience across TSMC's global sites.
中文範例
全球實體安全處
守護全球據點，打造零風險營運環境
全球實體安全處（GPS）負責維護 TSMC 各營運據點的實體安全、防災風險控管與營運韌性。從門禁管理、監控系統，到緊急應變與 ISO 認證，GPS 確保每個場域皆在高規格防護下穩定運作。

Type on Image影像上的文字

Typography can be applied on top of imagery. In these instances, use black typography on lighter images, and white typography on darker images to ensure that there is enough contrast. Never use colored typography on imagery.

文字可以置於影像之上。在這些情況下，淺色影像上使用黑色文字，深色影像上使用白色文字，以確保有足夠的對比度。永遠不要在影像上使用彩色文字。

正確Use white text over subtle dark overlay to ensure readability. Use black text on clean, light backgrounds. Always meet WCAG AA contrast (4.5:1 for body text).在深色覆蓋層上使用白色文字以確保可讀性。在乾淨的淺色背景上使用黑色文字。始終達到 WCAG AA 對比標準（內文 4.5:1）。
禁止Avoid placing light text on bright or detailed backgrounds. Do not use colored text over photos — it reduces legibility and looks unprofessional. Never sacrifice contrast for aesthetic preference.避免在明亮或細節繁多的背景上使用淺色文字。不要在照片上使用彩色文字——會降低可讀性且顯得不專業。永遠不要為了美觀偏好而犧牲對比度。

Spacing Scale間距系統

All spacing derives from a 4px base unit. Use only these values for margins, padding, and gaps. Consistent spacing is the single biggest factor in perceived design quality.

所有間距源自 4px 基礎單位。僅使用這些數值作為邊距、內距和間隔。一致的間距是影響設計質感的最大單一因素。

4
--sp-1
8
--sp-2
12
--sp-3
16
--sp-4
24
--sp-6
32
--sp-8
48
--sp-12
64
--sp-16
96
--sp-24
TokenpxUsage用途
--sp-14Icon-text gap, inline element spacing圖標與文字間距、行內元素間距
--sp-28Compact card padding, badge padding緊湊卡片內距、徽章內距
--sp-312Form field internal padding表單欄位內部間距
--sp-416Standard card padding, paragraph gap標準卡片內距、段落間距
--sp-624Section sub-spacing, card gap in grids區段子間距、網格中卡片間隔
--sp-832Section heading top margin區段標題頂部邊距
--sp-1248Major section dividers主要區段分隔
--sp-1664Page section padding頁面區段內距
--sp-2496Hero section vertical padding主視覺區段垂直內距
Chapter 10 — Visual Identity第 10 章——視覺識別
Graphic System & Iconography圖形系統與圖標學
Owner:負責： MarCom Team

GPS's graphic elements are derived from the logo mark's grid structure and curved form, echoing the brand's themes of protection, flow, and precision. These elements are designed to be used in conjunction with the brand logo, color, typography, and imagery. They can be applied in both sharp and blurred styles to introduce depth, motion, or emphasis, and are intended to complement layouts.

GPS 的圖形元素源自標誌圖標的網格結構和曲線造型，呼應品牌保護、流動和精確的主題。這些元素設計為與品牌標誌、色彩、字體排版和影像搭配使用。它們可以鋒利和模糊兩種風格呈現，用以引入深度、動感或強調，並旨在作為版面配置的補充。

Graphic Elements — Core Visual圖形元素——核心視覺

The primary graphic element is the checkerboard pattern derived from the logo mark, rendered on brand gradient backgrounds. These elements tie together the identity components — logo, typography, and imagery — into a cohesive visual system.

主要圖形元素是源自標誌圖標的棋格圖案，在品牌漸層背景上呈現。這些元素將識別元件——標誌、字體排版和影像——串聯成一個統一的視覺系統。

Three Element Styles三種元素風格

Visual elements derived from the GPS logomark's grid structure and curved form can be applied in three distinct styles.

源自 GPS 標誌圖標的網格結構和曲線造型的視覺元素，可以三種不同風格呈現。

Style 01風格 01
Blurred Organic模糊有機風格
Soft, atmospheric renderings of the checkerboard dots with gaussian blur and transparency. Used for background textures, hero sections, and brand-building materials where a subtle, modern feel is desired.以高斯模糊和透明度呈現的柔和、氛圍感棋格點陣。用於背景紋理、主視覺區段和需要微妙現代感的品牌建設材料。
Style 02風格 02
Flowing Organic流動有機風格
Curved, dynamic arrangements of dots and shapes suggesting movement and protection. Used for event materials, campaign visuals, and content where energy and motion are desired.暗示運動和保護的曲線、動態圓點與形狀排列。用於活動材料、宣傳視覺和需要能量感與動態感的內容。
Style 03風格 03
Sharp Geometric銳利幾何風格
Crisp, grid-aligned checkerboard patterns with clear edges. Used for data-driven content, technical documents, signage, and materials requiring precision and structure.邊緣清晰的網格對齊棋格圖案。用於數據驅動內容、技術文件、標識和需要精確與結構感的材料。

Graphic Application圖形應用

正確Use graphic elements for general layout enhancement on brand gradient backgrounds. Use as appropriate repeated patterns for texture and depth. Use for highlight moments — accent corners, section dividers, and focal points alongside photography.在品牌漸層背景上使用圖形元素做版面強化。適當使用重複圖案增添紋理和深度。用於強調時刻——裝飾角落、區段分隔線和攝影旁的焦點。
禁止Do not overuse the graphics — excessive pattern coverage overwhelms content and reduces readability. Elements should complement, never compete with, the content they accompany. Maintain visual breathing room.不要過度使用圖形——過多的圖案覆蓋會壓過內容並降低可讀性。元素應輔助、而非與其伴隨的內容競爭。維持視覺呼吸空間。

Icon System圖標系統

All icons must be custom SVG — no icon libraries (FontAwesome, Material, etc.).

所有圖標必須為自製 SVG——不使用圖標庫（FontAwesome、Material 等）。

Icon Property圖標屬性Spec規格
Stroke筆畫1.5–2px consistent一致
Corner radius圓角半徑2px min
Grid網格24×24px, 2px padding
Color色彩Single-color, currentColor單色，currentColor
Chapter 11 — Visual Identity第 11 章——視覺識別
Imagery & Photography影像與攝影
Owner:負責： MarCom Team

Imagery Guide影像指南

Imagery should reflect GPS's core values of security, resilience, and human impact. Use authentic, professional photos that feature people in real environments — such as security checkpoints, or secure facilities — to convey trust and clarity. Supporting imagery may include architectural shots, surveillance technology, or abstract compositions that suggest protection and precision.

影像應反映 GPS 的核心價值——安全、韌性和人文關懷。使用在真實環境中呈現人們的專業、真實照片——如安全檢查站或安全設施——以傳達信任和清晰感。輔助影像可包括建築攝影、監控技術，或暗示保護與精確的抽象構圖。

Lighting光線
Natural & Even自然均勻
No dramatic shadows or excessive lens flare無戲劇性陰影或過度鏡頭光暈
Composition構圖
Clear & Intentional清晰且有意圖
Strong focal point, clean backgrounds清晰的焦點、乾淨的背景
People人物
Authentic真實自然
Real interactions, no staging or artificial feel真實互動、非刻意擺拍或人工感
Color色彩
Neutral中性色調
No oversaturation or high-contrast grading不過度飽和或高對比色彩調校

All imagery is internal use only. Photos with identifiable individuals require signed release forms. The images are not authorized for external use.

所有影像僅供內部使用。包含可辨識個人的照片需要簽署肖像授權書。這些影像不得對外使用。

Things to Avoid應避免事項

Avoid Staging避免刻意擺拍
Avoid staged or artificial feel. Prioritize genuine moments reflecting real interactions and scenarios. Do not include people in unnatural or staged poses.避免刻意或人工感。優先選擇反映真實互動和場景的真誠瞬間。不要使用不自然或擺拍姿勢。
Avoid Overproduction避免過度製作
Balance professionalism and visual appeal, avoiding excessive manipulation or editing. Do not use overly dynamic lighting and excessive lens flare. Do not use oversaturated or high-contrast color grading.平衡專業性與視覺吸引力，避免過度後製。不要使用過度戲劇化的燈光和過多鏡頭光暈。不要使用過度飽和或高對比色彩調校。
Avoid Disconnected Context避免脈絡斷裂
Clarify image context to match intended message and prevent confusion or misinterpretation. Avoid images with excessive post-production effects.釐清影像脈絡以符合預期訊息，防止混淆或誤解。避免過度後製效果的影像。
Avoid Poor Composition避免糟糕構圖
Avoid clutter or chaos that diverts from intended focus. Ensure every photo has a clear subject and visual hierarchy.避免分散焦點的雜亂或混亂。確保每張照片都有清晰的主題和視覺層級。

Photography Shot List攝影拍攝清單

Six reference scene specifications. Use these as briefs for photographers — specific enough to ensure consistency, flexible enough to adapt to each site's environment.

六個參考場景規格。作為攝影師簡報使用——足夠具體以確保一致性，足夠靈活以適應各場域環境。

Shot 01 — Checkpoint場景 01——檢查站
Medium shot, eye level. Security officer greeting visitor with badge scan. Natural daylight from left. Clean industrial lobby background, out of focus at f/2.8. Subject making eye contact with visitor. Warm, professional — not surveillance.中景、平視角。安全人員問候訪客並掃描門禁卡。自然日光從左側照入。乾淨的工業風大廳背景，f/2.8 虛化。主體與訪客有眼神接觸。溫暖、專業——非監控感。
Shot 02 — Shift Briefing場景 02——換班簡報
Wide shot, slightly elevated (15°). Team of 4–6 in semi-circle around team lead with tablet. Fluorescent overhead + window ambient. Uniforms visible. Body language: engaged, leaning in. No staged posing.廣角、略微俯角（15°）。4–6 人半圓圍繞持平板的組長。頂部日光燈 + 窗戶環境光。制服可見。身體語言：投入、前傾。無擺拍。
Shot 03 — Technology場景 03——科技
Close-up, shallow depth of field. Hands interacting with access panel or monitoring screen. Screen content visible but not readable (privacy). Cool blue ambient from screens. Focus on hands + device interaction.特寫、淺景深。手與門禁面板或監控螢幕互動。螢幕內容可見但不可讀（隱私考量）。螢幕發出冷藍環境光。焦點在手部與裝置互動。
Shot 04 — Environment場景 04——環境
Wide establishing shot. Clean fab corridor or campus walkway with natural surveillance sightlines visible. Golden hour preferred. No people (or silhouettes only). Emphasize openness, design, CPTED principles — welcoming, not fortified.廣角建立鏡頭。乾淨的廠區走廊或園區步道，可見自然監控視線。偏好黃金時段。無人物（或僅剪影）。強調開放性、設計感、CPTED 原則——親切感，非堡壘感。
Shot 05 — Family Extension場景 05——家庭延伸
Medium-close, warm tones. Employee leaving site, transitioning to personal context (jacket on, bag, walking toward exit). Late afternoon light. Subtle smile. Conveys "safety travels home with you." No family members visible (privacy).中近景、暖色調。員工離開場域，轉換至個人情境（穿外套、背包、走向出口）。午後光線。微笑。傳達「安全跟你一起回家」。不拍攝家人（隱私考量）。
Shot 06 — Training場景 06——培訓
Medium shot, over-shoulder angle. Participant viewing tablet/screen with training content. Others visible in periphery. Bright, well-lit training room. Active participation — writing, tapping, discussing. Avoid "classroom" static rows.中景、過肩角度。參訓者觀看平板/螢幕上的培訓內容。他人在周邊可見。明亮的培訓室。主動參與——書寫、操作、討論。避免「教室」靜態排列。

Photography Anti-Patterns攝影反面教材

Three common failures that consistently produce off-brand imagery. Brief your photographer to avoid these specifically.

三個常見失敗模式，會持續產出偏離品牌的影像。請特別向攝影師說明避免這些情況。

Anti-Pattern 01反面教材 01
The Surveillance Shot監控視角照
High overhead angle, fisheye distortion, empty corridors, ceiling-mounted camera perspective. This is exactly the "security as control" frame we are working to replace. If it looks like CCTV footage, it is wrong.高空俯角、魚眼變形、空蕩走廊、天花板監視器視角。這正是我們正在努力取代的「安全即控制」框架。如果看起來像監視器畫面，就是錯的。
Anti-Pattern 02反面教材 02
The Green-Cast Fluorescent綠色日光燈色偏
Uncompensated overhead fluorescent lighting that casts a sickly green-yellow over skin tones and uniforms. Kills the brand palette. Always shoot with custom white balance or add portable LED panels to correct ambient color.未校正的頂部日光燈投射出病態的綠黃色偏在膚色和制服上。破壞品牌色盤。始終使用自訂白平衡拍攝，或加入攜帶型 LED 面板校正環境色溫。
Anti-Pattern 03反面教材 03
The Dystopian Empty反烏托邦空景
Empty lobbies, abandoned corridors, gates without people. Intended to show "secure environment" but reads as "abandoned facility." GPS imagery must include human presence — even a single person walking gives life and warmth.空蕩的大廳、無人的走廊、沒有人的閘門。意圖展現「安全環境」卻讀起來像「廢棄設施」。GPS 影像必須包含人的存在——即使一個人在走路也能帶來生命力和溫暖。
Chapter 12 — Expression第 12 章——表達
Brand Voice & Tone品牌語調
Owner: GPS Strategy & DX

Voice is who we are. Tone is how we adjust for context. GPS has one voice — calm, clear, and caring.

語調是我們的身份。語氣是我們因應情境的調整。GPS 擁有一個聲音——沉穩、清晰、有溫度。

Attribute 01屬性 01
Calm Authority沉穩的權威
Confidence from competence, not volume. In a crisis, our voice gets calmer.來自能力的自信，而非音量。在危機中，我們的聲音更加沉穩。
Attribute 02屬性 02
Clear Before Clever清晰優先於巧妙
Plain language, short sentences, concrete examples.淺顯的語言、短句、具體的例子。
Attribute 03屬性 03
Human First以人為本
People as people — not "resources" or "headcount."將人視為人——不是「資源」或「員額」。
Attribute 04屬性 04
Precise & Accountable精確且負責
Specific numbers, dates, owners. "By Q3" not "soon."具體的數字、日期、負責人。「Q3 前完成」而非「近期」。

Tone by Context依情境調整語氣

Context情境Tone語氣Example範例
EmergencyDirect, zero ambiguity直接、零模糊"Evacuate to Assembly B now. Do not use elevators."「立即疏散至集合點 B。不要使用電梯。」
PolicyFirm but respectful堅定但尊重"Tailgating compromises safety. Badge individually — 2 seconds."「尾隨通行危及安全。逐一刷卡——2 秒鐘。」
TrainingEncouraging, step-by-step鼓勵性、循序漸進"Start with Tier 1 — about 3 minutes."「從第一階開始——大約 3 分鐘。」
BrandWarm, aspirational溫暖、有願景"That confidence travels home with you."「那份安心，跟你一起回家。」
GPS VocabularyGPS 用語protect · support · enable · design · collaborate · care · guide · empower · together · trust · adapt · serve保護 · 支持 · 賦能 · 設計 · 協作 · 關懷 · 引導 · 賦權 · 共同 · 信任 · 適應 · 服務
Avoid避免用語enforce · mandate · police · surveil · comply (imperative) · resources (people) · headcount · zero tolerance執法 · 命令 · 監視 · 偵察 · 服從（命令式）· 資源（指人）· 員額 · 零容忍
Chapter 13 — Expression第 13 章——表達
Motion & Animation動態與動畫
Owner:負責： MarCom Team

Motion feels like a controlled sweep — purposeful, measured, never frenetic.

動態感覺像是一次有控制的掃掠——有目的、有節制、從不急躁。

Four Signature Motions四種標誌性動態

Pulse
Sweep
Reveal
Fade
StatusEntryDataAmbient

Tokens動態設計代符

Token代符Value值Use用途
--dur-fast150msHover, toggle
--dur-normal300msPanel slide, card reveal
--dur-slow600msPage transition, hero
--ease-defaultcubic-bezier(0.25,0.1,0.25,1)Standard
--ease-entercubic-bezier(0,0,0.2,1)Elements entering
--stagger60msSibling delay
Forbidden:禁止：No bounce/elastic. No spinning (surveillance connotation). No auto-play video BG. No infinite loops on content. No parallax. Respect prefers-reduced-motion.不使用彈跳/彈性動效。不使用旋轉（有監控聯想）。不使用自動播放影片背景。不使用內容的無限循環。不使用視差效果。尊重 prefers-reduced-motion。

Motion Personality動態性格

Each signature motion carries an emotional intent. Share these metaphors with your team to ensure the feel matches the technical parameters.

每種標誌性動態都帶有情感意圖。與團隊分享這些比喻，以確保感受與技術參數一致。

Reveal
A curtain rising gently一道輕輕升起的帷幕
Content emerges from rest — never jumps in. Like watching morning light gradually illuminate a room. Feels: calm arrival, quiet confidence.內容從靜止中浮現——永遠不會跳入。像觀看晨光逐漸照亮一個房間。感受：沉靜到來、安靜自信。
Pulse
A heartbeat, not an alarm一次心跳，而非警鈴
A rhythmic, living emphasis — not frantic. Like the steady blink of a system status indicator. Feels: alive, monitored, under control.有韻律的、活的強調——不是慌亂的。像系統狀態指示燈的穩定閃爍。感受：活躍、被監控、在掌控中。
Cascade
Dominoes in slow motion慢動作的骨牌
Sequential elements follow a leader — each waits its turn with precision. Like a well-drilled team moving through a checkpoint. Feels: orchestrated, professional, deliberate.序列元素跟隨引導者——每個精確等待自己的順序。像一個訓練有素的團隊通過檢查站。感受：有編排、專業、刻意為之。
Settle
A stone finding its resting place一顆石頭找到它的安歇之處
An element that overshoots slightly, then eases into its final position. Like setting down a briefcase on a desk — the smallest bounce, then stillness. Feels: resolved, grounded, complete.一個元素略微超出，然後緩和至最終位置。像把公事包放在桌上——最輕微的彈跳，然後靜止。感受：解決、踏實、完成。

Motion Timing Tokens動態時間代符

Motion動態Entry進入Exit退出Stagger錯開Easing緩動
Reveal400ms300ms60mscubic-bezier(0.25, 0.1, 0.25, 1.0)
Pulse600ms600ms—cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.6, 1)
Cascade350ms250ms80mscubic-bezier(0.22, 0.61, 0.36, 1)
Settle500ms400ms—cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1)

Named Easing Curves命名緩動曲線

Video Template Specs影片模板規格

Format格式Resolution解析度Safe Title安全標題區Logo Zone標誌區域Intro/Outro片頭/片尾
16:9 Landscape1920 × 108080% center中央 80%Bottom-right, 120px h右下，高 120px2.5s / 2s
9:16 Vertical1080 × 192085% center中央 85%Bottom-center, 80px h底部置中，高 80px2s / 1.5s
1:1 Square1080 × 108080% center中央 80%Bottom-right, 80px h右下，高 80px2s / 1.5s
Digital Signage數位看板1920 × 108090% center中央 90%Bottom-right, 120px h右下，高 120px2.5s / 2s

Audio & Sound音效與聲音

GPS does not maintain a sonic brand identity. Digital interfaces use system-default notification sounds only. Video productions may use ambient tone (low-frequency, non-melodic) but no branded music or jingles. Emergency communications follow standard alert tones per local regulation (OSHA, J-ALERT, etc.).

GPS 不維護聲音品牌識別。數位介面僅使用系統預設通知音。影片製作可使用氛圍音（低頻、非旋律性），但不使用品牌音樂或片頭曲。緊急通訊遵循當地法規的標準警報音（OSHA、J-ALERT 等）。

Motion Code Reference動態程式碼參考

/* GPS Motion Tokens */
:root {
  --ease-enter: cubic-bezier(0.25, 0.1, 0.25, 1.0);
  --ease-exit:  cubic-bezier(0.22, 0.61, 0.36, 1);
  --ease-settle: cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1);
  --dur-reveal: 400ms; --dur-cascade: 350ms;
  --dur-pulse: 600ms;  --dur-settle: 500ms;
}
@keyframes gps-reveal {
  from { opacity:0; transform:translateY(12px) }
  to   { opacity:1; transform:translateY(0) }
}
@keyframes gps-cascade {
  from { opacity:0; transform:translateX(-8px) }
  to   { opacity:1; transform:translateX(0) }
}
@media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) {
  *, *::before, *::after {
    animation-duration: 0.01ms !important;
    transition-duration: 0.01ms !important;
  }
}

Chapter 15 — Application: Print第 15 章——應用：印刷
Poster & Environmental Signage海報與環境標識
Owner:負責： MarCom Team

This template is designed for multi-purpose use — from internal notices and event announcements to thematic campaigns and educational messaging. While the subject matter and visuals may vary, the structure, type system, and overall visual logic help ensure visual consistency across departments.

此模板設計為多用途——從內部公告和活動宣傳到主題宣傳和教育訊息。雖然主題和視覺可能不同，但結構、字體系統和整體視覺邏輯有助於確保跨部門的視覺一致性。

Poster Grid System海報網格系統

All posters follow a 12-column grid with 16px gutters. Three zone structures accommodate different content types. Safe margin: 10mm from trim. Bleed: 3mm.

所有海報遵循 12 欄網格、16px 間溝。三種區域結構因應不同內容類型。安全邊距：距裁切線 10mm。出血：3mm。

Spec規格Value值
Grid網格12-column, 16px gutter
Trim (A3)裁切（A3）297 × 420mm
Bleed出血3mm
Safe margin安全邊距10mm
Resolution解析度300dpi (print) / 150dpi (large-format)

Text Placement Within Zones區域內文字放置

Within each poster zone, text follows a consistent vertical flow. Headlines anchor to the top of their zone. Body text follows with --sp-4 gap. Sublines sit --sp-2 below headlines.

每個海報區域內，文字遵循一致的垂直流動。標題錨定在區域頂部。內文以 --sp-4 間距跟隨。副行位於標題下方 --sp-2。

Zone區域Headline Position標題位置Body Flow內文流動Alignment對齊
Image Zone影像區Bottom-left overlay左下覆蓋Headline only, no body text on image僅標題，影像上不放內文Left-align靠左
Text Zone文字區Top of zone, 16px from zone edge區域頂部，距邊緣 16pxBelow headline, --sp-4 gap, left-align標題下方，--sp-4 間距，靠左Left-align (body), center OK for single-line CTA靠左（內文），單行 CTA 可置中
Footer Zone頁尾區—Logo left, legal text right, vertically centered標誌靠左，法律文字靠右，垂直置中Space-between兩端對齊

Poster Types & Use Cases海報類型與使用場景

Type 01類型 01
Image Poster形象海報
Use for visual-led content such as campaign posters, event photos, or brand messaging. Photography or illustration as the dominant visual element.用於以視覺為主導的內容，如宣傳海報、活動照片或品牌訊息。攝影或插畫作為主要視覺元素。
Type 02類型 02
Timeline Poster時間軸海報
Best for showing schedules or agendas for upcoming events or trainings. Date/time hierarchy with supporting imagery.最適合展示即將舉辦的活動或培訓的時程或議程。日期/時間層級搭配輔助影像。
Type 03類型 03
Text Notice Poster文字公告海報
Use for announcements, guidelines, or internal communications with more text content. Numbered sections with icon illustrations.用於公告、指引或文字內容較多的內部溝通。編號區段搭配圖標插畫。

Three Poster Mockups三種海報示意

Campaign
Safety is designed into every corner
GPS
Event
08
12
Security Training
Notice
Updated badge procedure
GPS · 2026.04

Editable Zones可編輯區域

Zone 01區域 01
Text Area文字區域
All copy should stay within the defined safe zone. Maintain clear hierarchy and appropriate spacing. Avoid placing text too close to the edges.所有文案應保持在定義的安全區域內。維持清晰的層級和適當的間距。避免將文字放置太靠近邊緣。
Zone 02區域 02
Image Area影像區域
Use photography or illustrations that support your topic. Visuals can extend beyond the placeholder, but keep layouts clean and avoid overly complex or off-brand styles.使用支持主題的攝影或插畫。視覺可延伸超出預留位置，但保持版面乾淨，避免過於複雜或偏離品牌的風格。
Zone 03區域 03
Logo / Footer Area標誌 / 頁尾區域
Do not move or resize. Ensure text and logo remain readable against background. The footer zone is fixed and should not be modified.不要移動或調整大小。確保文字和標誌在背景上保持可讀。頁尾區域是固定的，不應修改。

Signage環境標識

Entrance — Branded Wayfinding
Global Physical Security

Global Physical Security · Visitor Check-in →全球實體安全處 · 訪客報到 →

Uniform & Wearables制服與穿戴識別
Owner:負責： MarCom Team
Item項目Logo標誌Color色彩
Polo ShirtLeft chest, 50mm max, white on dark左胸，最大 50mm，深色底白色標誌Black fabric, turquoise piping黑色布料，青綠色滾邊
ID LanyardMark repeated at 20mm圖標 20mm 重複排列Turquoise-copper gradient sublimation青綠-銅色漸層熱昇華
Visitor BadgeMark, 15mm, top center圖標，15mm，頂部置中White card, turquoise header, category edge白色卡片，青綠色頁首，分類邊條
Hard Hat StickerMark only, optical at 20px僅圖標，20px 光學版White on turquoise circle, 30mm青綠色圓底白色，30mm
Hi-Vis VestFull horizontal, reflective完整水平標誌，反光材質Reflective silver on standard hi-vis標準反光背心上的反光銀色
Contracted security:承攬商保全：Vendor uniforms do not carry the GPS logo. A branded arm patch (50mm × 30mm, embroidered, turquoise on black) is provided for left sleeve.承攬商制服不使用 GPS 標誌。提供品牌臂章（50mm × 30mm，繡製，黑底青綠色）供左袖佩戴。

Material Specifications材質規格

Component組件Material材質Detail細節
Polo shirt fabricPolo 衫布料65/35 Poly-Cotton, 180gsmAnti-pill, moisture-wicking抗起毛球、吸濕排汗
Embroidery thread繡線Madeira RayonPMS 7466 C equivalent, 7 stitches/mmPMS 7466 C 等效色，7 針/mm
Arm patch臂章50 × 30mm, embroidered繡製Heat-seal backing, turquoise on black熱壓背膠，黑底青綠色
Lanyard識別帶20mm polyester sublimation聚酯熱昇華Turquoise-copper gradient, breakaway clip青綠-銅色漸層，安全斷裂夾
Hi-vis vest反光背心EN ISO 20471 Class 2Reflective silver logo, standard hi-vis yellow/orange反光銀色標誌，標準反光黃/橘
Vendor note: Confirm thread color match with physical swatch before bulk production. Minimum order: 50 units per item. Allow 4–6 weeks lead time for embroidered items.供應商備註：大量生產前請以實體色票確認繡線色彩。最低訂量：每品項 50 件。繡製品項需 4–6 週前置時間。

Web & Landing Page網頁與入口頁面
Owner:負責： GPS Strategy & DX

Design Tokens動態設計代符

Token代符Value值
Max width1200px (960px prose)

Core Components核心元件

Four foundational UI components. All use brand tokens. All states must be implemented.

四個基礎 UI 元件。全部使用品牌代符。所有狀態皆須實作。

BUTTON
Primary

Extended Components延伸元件

BADGE / TAG
Active Safe Caution Alert Inactive
Padding: 2px 8px · Radius: 3px · Font: Lato Bold 10px
TOAST / NOTIFICATION
✓ Access granted successfully存取已成功授權
⚠ Badge expires in 7 days門禁卡 7 天後到期
✗ Unauthorized access attempt未授權存取嘗試
Left border: 3px semantic color · Padding: 8px 12px · Auto-dismiss: 5s (success), persist (error)
MODAL / DIALOG
Confirm Action確認操作
Are you sure you want to revoke this access?您確定要撤銷此存取權限嗎？
Cancel取消
Revoke撤銷

TAB NAV
Overview總覽
Details詳情
History紀錄
Active: turquoise + 2px bottom border · Inactive: grey-500 · Padding: 6px 12px · Font: Lato Bold 12px
Chapter 18 — Application: Digital第 18 章——應用：數位
Email & Newsletter電子郵件與電子報
Owner:負責： GPS Strategy & DX
Supply Chain Security
GPS — Supply Chain Security
Monthly Intelligence Brief
Supply Chain Security Update
GPS Global Physical Security · Unsubscribe
AI & DX Navigator
GPS — AI & DX Navigator
Weekly Digest
AI Fluency Update
GPS Global Physical Security · Unsubscribe
Outlook-SafeOutlook 安全格式Tables only. System fonts. mso-line-height-rule: exactly. Max 600px. Inline CSS. Hosted images. Under 102KB.僅使用表格排版。系統字體。mso-line-height-rule: exactly。最大 600px。行內 CSS。託管圖片。低於 102KB。
禁止No flexbox/grid. No Google Fonts. No <style> blocks. No base64 images. No CSS variables. No BG-image on td without VML.不使用 flexbox/grid。不使用 Google Fonts。不使用 <style> 區塊。不使用 base64 圖片。不使用 CSS 變數。不在 td 上使用背景圖（除非搭配 VML）。

Newsletter Design System電子報設計系統

GPS operates three distinct newsletter streams, each with its own visual identity within the brand framework. All share the same structural grid and Outlook-safe constraints.

GPS 營運三個不同的電子報系列，各自在品牌框架內擁有獨立的視覺識別。全部共享相同的結構網格和 Outlook 安全約束。

Email Structure Grid電子郵件結構網格

Zone區域Height高度Spec規格
Header標頭80–100pxLogo left, meta right. Brand gradient or solid turquoise BG.標誌靠左，中繼資料靠右。品牌漸層或純青綠色背景。
Hero主視覺200–300pxHosted image or gradient. Alt text required. Max 200KB.託管圖片或漸層。必須有替代文字。最大 200KB。
Content內容Variable可變Table-based 1 or 2 column. H2: Bold 18px. Body: Regular 14px. Links: turquoise-600.表格排版 1 或 2 欄。H2：Bold 18px。內文：Regular 14px。連結：turquoise-600。
CTA44pxTurquoise-500 BG, white text, 16px padding, 4px radius. Bulletproof button (VML + padding fallback).Turquoise-500 背景，白色文字，16px 內距，4px 圓角。防彈按鈕（VML + padding 備用）。
Footer頁尾60–80pxGrey-100 BG. Logo mark (optical 20px). Legal text 10px. Unsubscribe link required.Grey-100 背景。標誌圖標（光學 20px）。法律文字 10px。必須有取消訂閱連結。

Three Newsletter Identities三份電子報視覺識別

Newsletter電子報Header Gradient標頭漸層Accent點綴色Frequency頻率Audience受眾
Supply Chain SecurityTurquoise → Copper (135°)Turquoise-600Monthly月刊Security managers, Section Heads安全管理人員、Section Head
AI & DX NavigatorCopper → Purple (135°)Copper-600Biweekly雙週刊All GPS staff全體 GPS 人員
GPS Rebranding UpdateDeep Turquoise → Turquoise (135°)Turquoise-500Quarterly季刊GPS Director, Section Heads, MarComGPS Director、Section Head、MarCom

Email Typography Stack電子郵件字體堆疊

Outlook and legacy clients ignore web fonts. Use system stacks only. The CJK fallback chain ensures proper rendering across Windows, macOS, and mobile.

Outlook 和舊版用戶端忽略網頁字體。僅使用系統字體堆疊。CJK 備用鏈確保在 Windows、macOS 和行動裝置上正確渲染。

Context情境Font Stack字體堆疊
EN bodyEN 內文Trebuchet MS, Verdana, Arial, sans-serif
CJK bodyCJK 內文'Microsoft JhengHei', 'PingFang TC', 'Hiragino Sans', sans-serif
Monospace等寬Consolas, 'Courier New', monospace

Outlook Rendering ChecklistOutlook 渲染檢查清單

Check檢查項目Requirement要求
Total file size檔案總大小< 102KB (Gmail clips at 102KBGmail 在 102KB 截斷)
Image hosting圖片託管External HTTPS URLs only — no base64, no CID僅外部 HTTPS URL——不用 base64，不用 CID
CSS methodCSS 方式Inline only — no <style> blocks (Outlook strips them)僅行內——不用 <style> 區塊（Outlook 會移除）
Layout method排版方式Nested <table> only — no flexbox, no grid, no float僅巢狀 <table>——不用 flexbox、不用 grid、不用 float
Line height行高mso-line-height-rule: exactly
CTA button行動按鈕VML fallback for Outlook, padding fallback for othersOutlook 用 VML 備用，其他用 padding 備用
Dark mode深色模式Test with [data-ogsc] and [data-ogsb] Outlook overrides使用 [data-ogsc] 和 [data-ogsb] Outlook 覆蓋進行測試
Testing測試Litmus / Email on Acid — minimum: Outlook 2019, Gmail, Apple Mail, Outlook.comLitmus / Email on Acid——最低：Outlook 2019、Gmail、Apple Mail、Outlook.com

Mobile & LINE OA行動裝置與 LINE 官方帳號
Owner:負責： GPS Strategy & DX

LINE OA Visual IdentityLINE 官方帳號視覺識別

The GPS LINE Official Account (@918rtiju) is the primary mobile touchpoint for the AI Micro-Learning System and direct push communications. All visual elements must maintain brand consistency within LINE's constraints.

GPS LINE 官方帳號（@918rtiju）是 AI 微型學習系統和直接推播通訊的主要行動觸點。所有視覺元素必須在 LINE 的限制條件下維持品牌一致性。

Rich Menu DesignRich Menu 設計

2500 × 1686px · 6-cell · turquoise-700 BG · white icons & text

Flex Message Design TokensFlex Message 設計代符

Element元素Spec規格
Profile ImageLogo mark on turquoise-50, 640×640px標誌圖標置於 turquoise-50 底色，640×640px
Rich Menu2500×1686px, 6-cell, turquoise-700 BG, white vectors2500×1686px，6 格，turquoise-700 背景，白色向量圖
Flex MessagesBrand hex codes. System sans body. Bold headers. Turquoise-500 CTA.品牌色碼。系統無襯線內文。粗體標題。Turquoise-500 行動按鈕。
Push NotificationsCalm authority voice. No ALL CAPS. No excessive punctuation.沉穩權威語調。不全部大寫。不過度使用標點符號。
GreetingBilingual zh-TW/EN. Warm tone. Quick-start buttons.雙語 zh-TW/EN。溫暖語調。快速啟動按鈕。
Element元素Spec規格
Header BG標頭背景Turquoise-500 or或 Copper-500
Body font內文字體System sans-serif, 14px, line-height 1.6系統無襯線，14px，行高 1.6
CTA button行動按鈕Turquoise-500 BG, #fff text, 12px radius
Card padding卡片內距16px
Max bubble width最大氣泡寬度300px (LINE constraintLINE 限制)
Image ratio影像比例1:1 or或 16:9

Push Notification Guidelines推播通知指南

正確Lead with the benefit or action. Keep under 100 characters. Use warm, human tone. Include one clear CTA. Respect quiet hours (no push between 22:00–07:00 local time).以好處或行動開頭。控制在 100 字元內。使用溫暖、人性化的語調。包含一個明確的行動呼籲。尊重安靜時段（當地時間 22:00–07:00 不推播）。
禁止No ALL CAPS. No excessive punctuation (!!!). No fear-based language. No more than 3 pushes per week per user. Never send test messages to production audience.不使用全大寫。不過度使用標點符號（!!!）。不使用恐懼式語言。每用戶每週不超過 3 則推播。絕不將測試訊息發送給正式受眾。
Chapter 20 — Application: Digital第 20 章——應用：數位
Digital Signage數位看板
Owner:負責： MarCom Team

Content Zones內容區域

Every signage screen follows a consistent layout structure regardless of content type.

每個看板畫面遵循一致的版面結構，不論內容類型。

Content Types & Rotation內容類型與輪替

Property屬性Value值
Resolution1920×1080 (landscape) or 1080×1920 (portrait)
Safe area5% margin all edges四邊 5% 邊距
Min text48px body, 72px headlines (at 1080p)
AnimationSlide transitions, 8s min dwell, no auto-video滑動轉場，最少停留 8 秒，不自動播放影片
LogoBottom-right or top-left, horizontal, min 120px h右下或左上，水平排列，最小高度 120px
Rotation6-screen starter kit, monthly refresh6 畫面入門套組，每月更新
Slide Type畫面類型Dwell Time停留時間Max per Rotation每輪最多Content內容
Announcement公告10–15s2Policy updates, event notices, training reminders政策更新、活動通知、培訓提醒
Brand / Culture品牌 / 文化8–10s2Pillar messaging, brand imagery, CPTED awareness支柱訊息、品牌影像、CPTED 意識
Safety Tip安全提示8s1Family extension tips, commute safety, seasonal awareness家庭延伸提示、通勤安全、季節性意識
Data / Metric數據 / 指標10s1Days without incident, training completion %, visitor count無事故天數、培訓完成率、訪客人數
Emergency override: When a site enters emergency mode, all signage content is replaced with a single full-screen emergency message. Red (#D94F4F) background, white text, 96px minimum font size. Standard content resumes only after all-clear from site command.緊急覆蓋：當場域進入緊急模式時，所有看板內容替換為單一全螢幕緊急訊息。紅色（#D94F4F）背景、白色文字、最小 96px 字級。標準內容僅在場域指揮中心發布全部解除後恢復。
Chapter 21 — Creative Variations第 21 章——創意變體
Campaign Moods主題活動視覺情緒
Owner:負責： GPS Strategy & DX

GPS supports distinct campaign moods while maintaining core identity. Logo, typography, and grid never change — only gradient, photography direction, and accent shift.

GPS 在維持核心識別的同時支持不同的宣傳情緒。標誌、字體排版和網格永遠不變——僅漸層、攝影方向和點綴色會調整。

Designed
Safety
Standard — Brand Forward標準——品牌導向

Default. Full turquoise-copper. Calm, professional.預設。完整青綠-銅色。沉穩、專業。

Primary GradientEvergreen
Alert
Protocol
Urgent — Security Alert緊急——安全警報

Deep turquoise + black. High contrast. Minimal.深青綠 + 黑色。高對比。極簡。

Deep TurquoiseEmergency
Living
Culture
Warm — Community溫暖——社群

Green-turquoise. People-first photography.綠-青綠色。以人為本的攝影。

Green ShiftWellness
AI &
Innovation
Forward — Technology前瞻——科技

Copper-purple. Technical, precise.銅-紫色。技術感、精確。

Purple ShiftDX Content
Family
Extension
Soft — Family & Wellbeing柔和——家庭與健康

Orange-copper. Warm, inviting, personal.橘-銅色。溫暖、親切、個人化。

Orange ShiftHome Safety
Operations
Command
Dark — Monitoring深色——監控

Black-turquoise. Vigilant, precise.黑-青綠色。警覺、精準。

Dark ModeDashboards

Campaign Specimens宣傳樣本

One composed mockup per mood, showing how gradient, photography direction, and accent color come together in a poster header.

每種情緒一個組合示意，展示漸層、攝影方向和點綴色如何在海報標頭中結合。

Standard — Brand Forward標準——品牌導向
Full turquoise-copper gradient. Calm, professional. General brand communications, welcome materials, standard collateral.完整青綠-銅色漸層。沉穩、專業。一般品牌通訊、歡迎材料、標準宣傳品。
Urgent — Security Alert緊急——安全警報
Deep turquoise + black. High contrast. Minimal imagery. Emergency communications, incident updates, safety bulletins.深青綠 + 黑色。高對比。極少影像。緊急通訊、事件更新、安全公告。
Warm — Community溫暖——社群
Green-turquoise. People-first photography. Team events, wellness programs, family safety tips, community building.綠-青綠色。以人為本攝影。團隊活動、健康計畫、家庭安全提示、社群建設。
Forward — Technology前瞻——科技
Copper-purple. Technical, precise. AI initiatives, system upgrades, technology showcases, digital transformation.銅-紫色。技術感、精確。AI 倡議、系統升級、技術展示、數位轉型。
Soft — Family & Wellbeing柔和——家庭與健康
Orange-copper. Warm, inviting, personal. Family extension programs, wellbeing initiatives, personal safety tips.橘-銅色。溫暖、親切、個人化。家庭延伸計畫、健康倡議、個人安全提示。
Dark — Monitoring深色——監控
Black-turquoise. Vigilant, precise. Control room interfaces, monitoring dashboards, technical security content.黑-青綠色。警覺、精準。控制室介面、監控儀表板、技術安全內容。

Campaign Naming & Versioning宣傳活動命名與版本管理

Every campaign gets a codename and folder structure. Regional variants share the same codename with a region suffix.

每個宣傳活動都有代號和資料夾結構。區域變體使用相同代號加區域後綴。

GPS_Campaign_{Year}_{Codename}/
├── _master/                 ← EN source files
│   ├── GPS_Poster_A3_Image_EN_v1.0.pdf
│   ├── GPS_Email_Header_EN_v1.0.html
│   └── GPS_Signage_Screen_EN_v1.0.png
├── _supplements/
│   ├── ZHTW/               ← HQ-TW supplement
│   ├── JP/                 ← JASM supplement
│   └── DE/                 ← ESMC supplement
└── _approvals/
    └── GPS_Campaign_Approval_{Date}.pdf

Example: GPS_Campaign_2026_SafetyFirst/

Cross-Touchpoint Consistency跨觸點一致性

Each mood must work across poster (A3), email header (600px), and digital signage (1920×1080). Below shows the "Warm — Community" mood across all three, demonstrating how the gradient and text scale adapt while maintaining identity.

每種情緒必須在海報（A3）、電子郵件標頭（600px）和數位看板（1920×1080）上都能運作。以下展示「溫暖——社群」情緒在三種觸點上的應用，呈現漸層和文字如何調整縮放同時維持識別。

GPS
Together for Safety一起守護安全
Community Day 2026社群日 2026
Global Physical Security
A3 PosterA3 海報
Together for Safety一起守護安全
Monthly Community Update月度社群更新
Email body content area (600px max-width)…電子郵件內文區（最大寬度 600px）…
Email Header電郵標頭
Together for Safety一起守護安全
Community Day · All Sites · March 2026社群日 · 全場域 · 2026 年 3 月
GPS
Global Physical
Security
Digital Signage (1920×1080)數位看板（1920×1080）
Adaptation rules: Gradient direction adjusts by format — 180° vertical for tall posters, 135° diagonal for landscape/email. Text scales proportionally but never below 11px body (poster) / 14px body (email) / 28px body (signage at 1080p). Logo always uses the horizontal lockup; mark-only at signage distance.調整規則：漸層方向依格式調整——高型海報用 180° 垂直，橫式/電郵用 135° 對角。文字等比縮放但不低於 11px 內文（海報）/ 14px 內文（電郵）/ 28px 內文（1080p 看板）。標誌始終使用水平組合；看板距離使用純圖標。
Chapter 22 — Creative Variations第 22 章——創意變體
Seasonal & Event Adaptations季節與活動視覺變體
Owner:負責： GPS Strategy & DX
Season / Event季節 / 活動Gradient漸層Photography攝影Accent點綴色
Spring / New YearGreen-turquoiseNature + architectureGreen-400
Summer / Safety MonthStandardOutdoor safety, hydrationTurquoise-400
Autumn / Fire SafetyOrange-copperFire equipment, drillsOrange-500
Winter / Year-EndDeep turquoise-blackNight-shift, winter safetyTurquoise-300
New Site LaunchFull spectrumConstruction → completionAll secondaries
Global Safety DayStandard + whiteCross-site montagePure white
Award / RecognitionCopper-purplePortraits, achievementCopper-500
Always Preserved始終保留GPS logo unmodified. Noto Sans TC + Lato. Poster three-zone structure. Voice attributes. Clearspace. Accessibility.GPS 標誌不修改。Noto Sans TC + Lato。海報三區結構。語調屬性。安全空間。無障礙。
Never Modified永不修改Logo color/shape/proportions. Type hierarchy max 3 sizes. Minimum logo sizes. Core turquoise or black tokens. Brand behaviors or voice vocabulary.標誌色彩/形狀/比例。字體層級最多 3 種尺寸。標誌最小尺寸。核心青綠色或黑色代符。品牌行為或語調用語。
Approval:核准：Standard mood → MarCom self-approves. Seasonal → GPS Strategy reviews. New event variation → GPS Director approves. Variations unused for 12 months expire.標準情緒 → MarCom 自行核准。季節性 → GPS 策略審核。新活動變體 → GPS Director 核准。12 個月未使用的變體自動失效。
Chapter 23 — Governance第 23 章——治理
Co-branding & Partnership聯合品牌與合作
Owner:負責： GPS Strategy · Approver: GPS Director核准：GPS Director

Organizational Logo Architecture組織標誌架構

GSM (Global Security Management) maintains its own logo as the parent organization. Three divisions — GPS (Global Physical Security), ITS (Information Technology Security), and PIP (Personal Information Protection) — each operate their own distinct logos under the GSM umbrella. This brand bible governs the GPS logo exclusively. GPS's brand identity covers all 9 regions and 16+ legal entities. Regional supplements adapt language — they do not create sub-brands or alternative visual identities.

GSM（全球安全管理處）以母組織身份維護自有標誌。三個部門——GPS（全球實體安全處）、ITS（資訊技術安全處）和 PIP（個人資料保護處）——各自在 GSM 旗下運營獨立標誌。本品牌聖經僅規範 GPS 標誌。GPS 的品牌識別涵蓋所有 9 個區域和 16+ 法律實體。區域補充僅調整語言——不創建子品牌或替代視覺識別。

Visual Architecture視覺架構

Brand Architecture Relationships品牌架構關係

Relationship關係Visual Treatment視覺處理Approval核准
GPS ↔ GSM (Parent)When co-displayed, GSM logo takes parent position (left or top). GPS logo in subordinate position. 1px divider in var(--g200) separates entities. Minimum separation = GPS clearspace rule.同時展示時，GSM 標誌取上級位置（左側或頂部）。GPS 標誌居下級位置。var(--g200) 的 1px 分隔線區隔實體。最小間距 = GPS 安全空間規則。GSM Director
GPS ↔ ITS / PIP (Siblings)Equal visual weight. Each division uses its own logo. Shared header/footer permitted with division identifier. Do not merge or blend division logos into composite marks.同等視覺權重。各部門使用自己的標誌。允許共用頁首/頁尾加部門識別。不可合併或混搭部門標誌成複合圖標。GSM Director for joint comms
GPS ↔ CorporateGPS logo always subordinate to corporate mark. Must remain visually consistent with corporate guidelines at all times.GPS 標誌始終從屬於企業標誌。必須隨時與企業規範保持視覺一致。Corporate PR for external use
GPS ↔ External VendorsGPS brand leads. Vendor logo in "supported by" secondary position. Vendor branding ≤ 20% of visual area.GPS 品牌主導。供應商標誌置於「supported by」次要位置。供應商品牌元素 ≤ 20% 視覺面積。GPS Strategy
GPS ↔ Government / RegulatoryGovernment seal takes protocol precedence. GPS in secondary position. Neutral background — no GPS gradient.政府徽章依協議優先。GPS 居次要位置。中性背景——不使用 GPS 漸層。GPS Director + Legal
Chapter 24 — Governance第 24 章——治理
Brand Performance Metrics品牌績效指標
Owner: GPS Strategy & DX · Approver: GPS Director核准：GPS Director

A brand standard without measurement is a preference document.

沒有衡量指標的品牌標準只是一份偏好文件。

Pillar 01支柱 01
Perception認知度
Do people understand GPS's role? Unaided recall, sentiment, language analysis.人們了解 GPS 的角色嗎？無提示回想、情感分析、語言分析。
Pillar 02支柱 02
Consistency一致性
Are all outputs on-brand? Quarterly audit of 20 random samples.所有產出都符合品牌嗎？每季稽核 20 個隨機樣本。
Pillar 03支柱 03
Reach觸及率
Are messages landing? Open rates, cascade completion, geo coverage.訊息有傳達嗎？開信率、層級傳達完成率、地域覆蓋率。

Brand Metrics品牌指標

Metric指標Method方法Freq頻率Target目標
Brand Sentiment5-question pulse surveyQuarterly+15% vs baseline, Year 1
Visual Consistency20 outputs/quarter auditQuarterly≥85% compliance
Behavioral AlignmentMystery visitorQuarterly4/5 behaviors observed
AI FluencyMicro-Learning tiersMonthly30% Builder in 6 months
Geo CoverageActive feedback loopsQuarterly7/9 sites by Q3

Communications Infrastructure Metrics溝通基礎設施指標

Metric指標Method方法Freq頻率Target目標
Message Delivery LatencyTime from HQ publish to last-site receipt從總部發布到最後一個場域收到的時間Per message≤48 hours for all 9 regions
Cascade Completion RateSection Head confirmation of relaySection Head 確認轉達Monthly≥90% confirmation
Email Open RateNewsletter analytics電子報分析Per send≥45% average across 3 streams
Translation TurnaroundTime from EN master to supplement delivery從英文主版到補充版交付的時間Per piece≤5 business days (JP/DE/SC/ES)
Digital Signage CurrencySpot checks — is displayed content current?抽檢——顯示的內容是否為最新？Monthly≥90% screens showing ≤30-day content
Contracted Security ReachSupervisor confirmation of shift briefing delivery主管確認換班簡報已傳達Monthly≥80% briefings delivered on schedule

Crisis Communication Protocol危機溝通協議

When a security incident occurs at a GPS-managed site, brand voice must remain consistent while adapting to urgency. The GPS "Calm Authority" voice attribute becomes the governing principle — our voice gets calmer as the situation gets more serious.

當 GPS 管理場域發生安全事件時，品牌聲音必須維持一致，同時因應緊急程度做出調整。GPS 的「沉穩權威」語調屬性成為主導原則——情況越嚴重，我們的聲音越沉穩。

Phase階段Timeline時程Action處置Owner負責人
Acknowledge0–30 minInternal holding statement to affected site leadership. "We are aware of [incident type] at [site]. Response teams are activated. Updates will follow at [time]." No speculation. No blame. Facts only.對受影響場域主管發出內部暫定聲明。「我們已知悉 [場域] 發生 [事件類型]。應變團隊已啟動。將於 [時間] 提供後續更新。」不臆測。不歸咎。僅陳述事實。Site Security Mgr
Inform30 min–2 hrsStructured update to GPS Director, Section Heads, and affected site all-staff. Channels: email + digital signage for affected site, email for global leadership.向 GPS Director、Section Head 和受影響場域全員發送結構化更新。通路：受影響場域使用電子郵件 + 數位看板，全球主管使用電子郵件。GPS Strategy
Coordinate2–24 hrsCross-functional alignment with Corporate PR (if external exposure), HR (if personnel impact), Legal (if regulatory). GPS provides facts; Corporate PR handles any external statement.與企業公關（若有外部曝光）、人資（若涉及人員影響）、法務（若涉及法規）進行跨部門對齊。GPS 提供事實；企業公關處理任何對外聲明。GPS Director
Resolve & Debrief24–72 hrsAll-clear communication. After-action summary (internal). Brand voice returns to standard warmth. Lessons learned documented.全部解除通訊。事後行動摘要（內部）。品牌聲音恢復至標準溫暖。記錄經驗教訓。GPS Strategy + MarCom
GPS never speaks externally.GPS 從不對外發言。All external communication routes through Corporate PR. GPS provides factual briefing materials. The GPS brand voice adapts under pressure but never abandons its core attributes — especially "Human First" and "Calm Authority."所有對外溝通經由企業公關部門。GPS 提供事實簡報材料。GPS 品牌聲音在壓力下調整但從不放棄核心屬性——特別是「以人為本」和「沉穩的權威」。

Brand Evolution Governance品牌演進治理

The GPS brand is a living system. As the organization matures, the brand must evolve with it — but evolution must be governed, not improvised.

GPS 品牌是一個活的系統。隨著組織成熟，品牌必須隨之演進——但演進必須被治理，而非即興發揮。

Change Type變更類型Example範例Proposer提案者Approval核准Communication溝通方式
Token adjustmentHex value correction, weight update色碼值修正、字重更新MarCom / StrategySelf-approved, logged in Appendix V自行核准，記錄於附錄 VChangelog update
Chapter revisionNew do/don't examples, expanded specs新增規範範例、擴展規格GPS StrategyGPS Strategy reviewVersion bump, email to brand owners版本升級，郵件通知品牌負責人
Structural changeNew chapter, pillar addition, logo modification新章節、支柱新增、標誌修改GPS StrategyGPS Director sign-offFull version release, all-hands briefing完整版本發布，全員簡報
Narrative arc transitionYear 2 → Year 3 messaging shift第二年 → 第三年訊息轉換GPS StrategyGPS Director + Section Head alignmentGPS Director + Section Head 對齊Campaign launch, regional cascade宣傳啟動，區域層級傳達
Annual Brand Review:年度品牌檢視：Every Q4, GPS Strategy conducts a comprehensive brand health review — synthesizing perception data, consistency audits, comms metrics, and behavioral assessments. Findings and proposed evolution items are presented to the GPS Director for approval before the new fiscal year.每年 Q4，GPS 策略團隊進行全面品牌健康檢視——綜合認知數據、一致性稽核、溝通指標和行為評估。發現及建議演進項目於新會計年度前呈報 GPS Director 核准。
Chapter 25 — Governance第 25 章——治理
Templates & Toolkit模板與工具包
Owner:負責： MarCom Team
Template模板Format格式Use Case使用場景
Image PosterFigma + CanvaCampaigns, event promotion
Timeline PosterFigma + CanvaSchedules, agendas, training
Text Notice PosterFigma + CanvaAnnouncements, policy updates
Email — All-StaffMJML / HTMLDivision-wide announcements
Email — NewsletterMJML / HTML3 newsletter streams
Presentation DeckPPTXDirector briefings, training
One-PagerDOCX / HTMLQuick reference, shift briefing cards快速參考、換班簡報卡
Digital SignageFigmaInternal screens, displays

Visual Consistency視覺一致性

Three pillars govern visual consistency across all GPS outputs:

三大支柱治理所有 GPS 產出的視覺一致性：

Typography字體排版
Brand Fonts Only僅使用品牌字體
Stick with the brand fonts. Use approved heading/subheading/body text sizes for hierarchy. Max 3 font sizes in one sector to maintain readability.堅持使用品牌字體。使用核定的標題/副標題/內文字級維持層級。每區段最多 3 種字級以維持可讀性。
Color色彩
Brand Palette品牌色盤
Begin with neutral or brand-approved colors. Sticking to the brand palette makes it easier to keep things consistent without needing design expertise. You may use topic-specific color themes, but avoid harsh neon tones or visually jarring combinations.以中性或品牌核准色開始。遵循品牌色盤能更輕鬆地維持一致性，無需設計專業。可使用主題專屬配色，但避免刺眼的霓虹色或視覺不協調的組合。
Graphics圖形
Pattern for Highlight圖形用於強調
Use graphic pattern for highlight, not filler. The checkerboard elements should accent and complement, never overwhelm the content.使用圖形做強調，而非填充。棋格元素應做點綴和輔助，永遠不要壓過內容。

Visual Do's & Don'ts視覺規範

Text Hierarchy文字層級

正確Use approved heading/subheading/body text sizes. Follow spacing and alignment structure. Use max 3 different font sizes/weights in one sector to keep readability and hierarchy. Rearrange layout based on your need — the structure is flexible.使用核定的標題/副標題/內文字級。遵循間距和對齊結構。每區段最多使用 3 種不同字級/字重以維持可讀性和層級。可依需要調整排版——結構是靈活的。
禁止Do not mix fonts or make everything bold. Do not stretch or shrink text manually. Do not center-align everything by default — left-alignment is the standard for body text.不要混用字體或全部加粗。不要手動拉伸或縮小文字。不要預設置中對齊——左對齊是內文的標準。

Illustration Style插畫風格

正確Use minimal, clean, vector-style illustrations. Maintain consistent stroke, perspective, and color. Prefer neutral or brand-accented palettes. Introduce custom topic-specific color accents carefully.使用簡約、乾淨的向量風格插畫。維持一致的筆畫、透視和色彩。優先使用中性或品牌點綴色盤。謹慎引入自訂主題色彩。
禁止Do not use mismatched clipart or stock cartoon packs. Do not combine different illustration styles with photo or 3D styles randomly. Maintain a single visual language per piece.不要使用不搭配的剪貼圖或素材卡通包。不要隨意混搭不同插畫風格與照片或 3D 風格。每件作品維持單一的視覺語言。

Color Usage色彩使用

正確Start with neutral or brand base. Ensure contrast between background and type. You may introduce custom topic-specific color accents carefully as long as they harmonize with the brand palette.以中性色或品牌色為底。確保背景與文字之間的對比。可謹慎引入自訂主題色彩，只要與品牌色盤協調。
禁止Do not use harsh neon tones or visually jarring combinations. Do not apply random rainbows or unbalanced color blocks. Do not color logos or type arbitrarily without ensuring sufficient contrast.不要使用刺眼的霓虹色或視覺不協調的組合。不要使用隨意的彩虹色或不平衡的色塊。不要任意為標誌或文字上色而未確保充分的對比。

Text Hierarchy — Do's & Don'ts

文字層級——規範

Illustration Style — Do's & Don'ts

插畫風格——規範

Color Usage — Do's & Don'ts

色彩使用——規範

Brand Violation Remediation品牌違規處理

When a quarterly brand audit or ad-hoc review identifies a violation, follow this remediation pathway:

當季度品牌稽核或臨時檢查發現違規時，遵循以下處理流程：

Severity嚴重度Example範例Action處置Timeline時程
MinorWrong font weight, slightly off color字重錯誤、色彩些微偏差MarCom sends correction email with correct asset attached. No escalation.MarCom 寄送修正郵件並附上正確素材。無須升級。Corrected within 5 business days5 個工作日內修正
ModerateStretched logo, non-brand color palette, missing clearspace拉伸標誌、非品牌色盤、缺少安全空間GPS Strategy contacts site owner directly. Provides correct template. Logged in audit tracker.GPS 策略直接聯繫場域負責人。提供正確模板。記錄於稽核追蹤。Corrected within 10 business days10 個工作日內修正
SevereUnauthorized co-branding, logo modification, external exposure of internal materials未授權聯合品牌、標誌修改、內部材料外洩GPS Director notified. Material pulled immediately. Root cause analysis. Section Head briefing.通知 GPS Director。立即撤下材料。根因分析。Section Head 簡報。Same-day pull, 5-day resolution當日撤下，5 日解決
Remediation philosophy:處理哲學：The goal is education, not punishment. Most violations happen because people don't have access to the right templates. Fix the system, not the person.目標是教育，而非懲罰。多數違規發生是因為人們無法取得正確的模板。修正系統，而非修正人。
Appendix A附錄 A
New Site Brand Activation Playbook新廠區品牌啟動手冊
Owner:負責： GPS Strategy & DX

When a new site enters GPS — greenfield (JASM Kumamoto, ESMC Dresden) or acquisition — brand activation follows a 90-day playbook.

當新廠區進入 GPS 管轄——無論是綠地建設（JASM 熊本、ESMC 德勒斯登）或併購——品牌啟動遵循 90 天手冊。

Phase階段Timeline時程Deliverables交付物Owner負責人
0: Pre-Arrival0：到場前Day −30 to 0第 −30 至 0 天Brand kit shipped. Local owner identified. Language supplement confirmed. Wayfinding designed.品牌工具包寄出。指定當地負責人。語言補充版確認。指引導引設計完成。GPS Strategy + MarCom
1: Foundation1：基礎Day 1–30第 1–30 天Signage installed. Access points branded. Welcome materials. Orientation session.標識安裝完成。出入口品牌化。歡迎材料。導覽說明會。Regional Owner + Site Mgr
2: Integration2：整合Day 31–60第 31–60 天Poster rotation. Digital signage connected. Feedback loop activated. First brand check.海報輪替。數位看板連線。回饋機制啟動。首次品牌檢查。MarCom + Regional Owner
3: Calibration3：校準Day 61–90第 61–90 天Behavioral assessment. Perception baseline. Cultural adjustments. Site declared "brand-active."行為評估。認知基線。文化調整。場域宣告「品牌啟用」。GPS Strategy
ESMC Dresden: Works Council (Betriebsrat) briefing required in Phase 0. German supplement for all employee materials. +2 weeks approval cycle. 工會 (Betriebsrat) 簡報於第 0 階段必須完成。所有員工材料需德語補充版。審批流程加 2 週。

JASM Kumamoto: Greenfield — building culture from scratch. Describe changes as kaizen. Nemawashi pre-alignment required. Japanese supplement. LINE Works as primary channel. 綠地建設——從零建立文化。將變革描述為改善 (kaizen)。需要根回共識。日語補充版。LINE Works 為主要通路。

Activation Checklist by Phase各階段啟動檢查清單

Each phase has a clear completion gate. A phase is not complete until all items are checked off by the regional owner.

每個階段都有明確的完成關卡。區域負責人核對完所有項目後，該階段才算完成。

Phase 0 — Pre-Arrival第 0 階段——到場前
☐ Brand kit requested from MarCom
☐ Local owner named and briefed
☐ Language supplement confirmed (JP/DE/CN)
☐ Wayfinding design approved
☐ Digital signage hardware spec confirmed
☐ Works Council / union briefing scheduled (if applicable)☐ 向 MarCom 申請品牌工具包
☐ 指定當地負責人並完成簡報
☐ 語言補充版確認（JP/DE/CN）
☐ 指引導引設計核准
☐ 數位看板硬體規格確認
☐ 工會簡報排程（如適用）
Phase 1 — Foundation第 1 階段——基礎
☐ Signage installed at all access points
☐ Welcome materials distributed
☐ Orientation session delivered
☐ GPS logo visible at main entrance
☐ Digital signage connected and showing content
☐ Emergency signage bilingual and tested☐ 所有出入口標識安裝完成
☐ 歡迎材料已分發
☐ 導覽說明會已舉辦
☐ GPS 標誌在主入口可見
☐ 數位看板連線並顯示內容
☐ 緊急標識雙語且已測試
Phase 2 — Integration第 2 階段——整合
☐ Poster rotation established (monthly)
☐ Newsletter distribution confirmed
☐ Feedback channel active (LINE / email)
☐ First brand compliance check passed
☐ Local staff trained on brand basics
☐ Shift briefing materials deployed☐ 海報輪替建立（每月）
☐ 電子報分發確認
☐ 回饋管道啟動（LINE / 電郵）
☐ 首次品牌合規檢查通過
☐ 當地人員完成品牌基礎培訓
☐ 換班簡報材料部署
Phase 3 — Calibration第 3 階段——校準
☐ Behavioral assessment conducted
☐ Perception baseline survey (5 questions)
☐ Cultural adjustments documented
☐ Site declared "brand-active"
☐ Quarterly audit schedule confirmed
☐ Hand-off to steady-state regional owner☐ 行為評估完成
☐ 認知基線調查完成（5 題）
☐ 文化調整已記錄
☐ 場域宣告「品牌啟用」
☐ 季度稽核排程確認
☐ 移交至常態區域負責人
Appendix L附錄 L
Language Architecture語言架構
Owner:負責： GPS Strategy & DX
Tier層級Language語言Code代碼Scope範圍Font字體
Co-PrimaryEnglishENAll global, master document全球通用，主文件Lato
Co-PrimaryTraditional Chinesezh-TWHQ-TW, all bilingual comms台灣總部，所有雙語通訊Noto Sans TC
SupplementSimplified ChineseSCShanghai & Nanjing entitiesNoto Sans SC
SupplementGermanDEESMC DresdenNoto Sans
SupplementJapaneseJPJASM + Japan entitiesNoto Sans JP
SupplementSpanishESArizona workforce (OSHA)Noto Sans

Supplements cover employee-facing safety comms, training, wayfinding, emergency procedures, and shift briefing cards. They do not cover strategy docs, Director-level comms, cross-regional newsletters, or this portal.

補充版涵蓋面向員工的安全通訊、培訓、指引導引、緊急程序和換班簡報卡。不涵蓋策略文件、Director 層級通訊、跨區電子報或本入口網站。

Bilingual Layout Rules雙語排版規則

When both languages appear simultaneously on a single layout — the default in Taiwan, Japan (JP/EN), and Germany (DE/EN) — follow these composition rules.

當兩種語言同時出現在同一版面——台灣、日本（JP/EN）和德國（DE/EN）的預設情況——遵循以下排版規則。

Rule規則Value值
CJK headline sizeCJK 標題字級100% (primary主要)
EN headline sizeEN 標題字級85–90% of CJK
CJK body line-heightCJK 內文行高1.85
EN body line-heightEN 內文行高1.75
Stacking order堆疊順序Primary language on top, secondary below主要語言在上，次要語言在下
Paragraph spacing段落間距1.5× normal between language blocks語言區塊間為正常值的 1.5 倍

Multilingual Signage多語言標識

Environmental signage at each region follows a strict language hierarchy. Primary language at 140% size, secondary at 100%. Always stacked vertically, never side-by-side on door/wall signs.

各區域環境標識遵循嚴格的語言層級。主要語言為 140% 字級，次要語言為 100%。始終垂直堆疊，門牌/壁面標識永不並排。

Region區域Primary主要Secondary次要Size Ratio字級比例
HQ-TWzh-TWEN140% / 100%
JASM (JP)JPEN140% / 100%
ESMC (DE)DEEN140% / 100%
AZ (US)ENES (where required)（依需求）140% / 100%
CN (SH/NJ)zh-CNEN140% / 100%

Regional Supplement Specimen區域補充版樣本

Below is an annotated specimen of a German-language safety poster (ESMC Dresden) showing how regional supplements map to the EN master.

以下為德語安全海報（ESMC 德勒斯登）的標注樣本，展示區域補充版如何對應英文主版。

ESMC Dresden — Supplement Specimen
Sicherheitsschulung
Safety Training — Lato Bold 11px
Alle Mitarbeiter sind verpflichtet, die vierteljährliche Schulung bis zum 15. März abzuschließen.
↑ System sans-serif 11px · DE body
All employees must complete quarterly training by March 15.
↑ Lato Regular 9px · EN reference subline
GLOBAL PHYSICAL SECURITY
ESMC · Dresden

JP Regional Specimen — JASM KumamotoJP 區域樣本——JASM 熊本

Japanese supplement uses three scripts (hiragana, katakana, kanji). Honorific register must be appropriate for context. Vertical writing (tategaki) is not permitted in GPS materials — all text remains horizontal.

日語補充版使用三種文字（平假名、片假名、漢字）。敬語層級須因應情境適當使用。GPS 材料中不允許直書（縱書き）——所有文字維持橫書。

JASM Kumamoto — Supplement Specimen
安全研修のご案内
Safety Training Notice — Lato Bold 11px
全従業員は3月15日までに四半期研修を完了していただく必要がございます。
↑ Noto Sans JP 11px · 丁寧語 (polite form)
All employees must complete quarterly training by March 15.
↑ Lato Regular 9px · EN reference subline
GLOBAL PHYSICAL SECURITY
JASM · 熊本
JP SpecJP 規格Value值
Primary font主要字體Noto Sans JP (Regular/Medium/Bold)
Fallback備用字體Hiragino Kaku Gothic ProN, Yu Gothic
Honorific register敬語層級丁寧語 (polite) for all-staff; 謙譲語 for Director-level全員通訊用丁寧語；Director 層級用謙譲語
Vertical text直書Not permitted in GPS materialsGPS 材料中不允許使用
Primary channel主要通路LINE Works

zh-CN Supplement — Shanghai & Nanjingzh-CN 補充版——上海與南京

Simplified Chinese supplements serve Shanghai and Nanjing entities. Key differences from zh-TW materials:

簡體中文補充版服務上海和南京實體。與 zh-TW 材料的主要差異：

Attribute屬性zh-TWzh-CN
Font stack字體堆疊Noto Sans TC, Microsoft JhengHeiNoto Sans SC, Microsoft YaHei
Encoding編碼UTF-8 (Big5 legacy)UTF-8 (GB2312 legacy)
Punctuation標點符號「」、。""、。
Terminology術語資訊安全 / 實體安全信息安全 / 实体安全
Regulatory context法規脈絡—CSL compliance, data localizationCSL 合規、數據在地化
Important: zh-CN entities operate with greater regulatory autonomy. All materials must be reviewed by the CN regional owner for regulatory compliance before distribution. Do not auto-convert zh-TW to zh-CN — terminology and nuance differ significantly.重要：zh-CN 實體擁有更大的法規自主權。所有材料在分發前必須經 CN 區域負責人審查法規合規性。不要自動將 zh-TW 轉換為 zh-CN——術語和語境差異顯著。

RACI Ownership MatrixRACI 權責矩陣
Owner:負責： GPS Strategy & DX

R = Responsible · A = Accountable · C = Consulted · I = InformedR = 負責 · A = 當責 · C = 諮詢 · I = 告知

R = 負責 · A = 當責 · C = 諮詢 · I = 告知

ActivityDirectorDirectorStrategyStrategyMarComMarComSection HdSection HdRegionalRegional
Brand Foundation品牌基礎ARCII
Brand Behaviors品牌行為準則ARICC

Voice & ToneARCCC
Motion動態ICRII
