Appendix T附錄 T
Design Token Export設計代符匯出
Owner:負責： GPS Strategy & DX

Copy-paste ready token definitions for all major platforms. These are the single source of truth — do not manually define brand values in code.

各主要平台的代符定義，可直接複製貼上使用。這些是唯一的事實來源——不要在程式碼中手動定義品牌值。

JSON TokensJSON 代符

Import into Figma Tokens, Style Dictionary, or any token pipeline.

匯入 Figma Tokens、Style Dictionary 或任何代符管線。

{
  "color": {
    "primary": {
      "turquoise":    { "value": "#26A7B0", "type": "color" },
      "copper":       { "value": "#CAC3D2", "type": "color" }
    },
    "secondary": {
      "purple":  { "value": "#8C9FCB", "type": "color" },
      "green":   { "value": "#8CC897", "type": "color" },
      "orange":  { "value": "#F6AD90", "type": "color" }
    },
    "neutral": {
      "black":   { "value": "#0A1A22", "type": "color" },
      "ink":     { "value": "#1A2A32", "type": "color" },
      "charcoal":{ "value": "#2D3E48", "type": "color" },
      "slate":   { "value": "#4A5E6A", "type": "color" },
      "grey500": { "value": "#6B7B85", "type": "color" },
      "grey400": { "value": "#8E9CA5", "type": "color" },
      "grey300": { "value": "#B0BCC3", "type": "color" },
      "grey200": { "value": "#D2DAE0", "type": "color" },
      "grey100": { "value": "#E8EDF0", "type": "color" },
      "grey50":  { "value": "#F4F5F7", "type": "color" },
      "white":   { "value": "#FAFBFC", "type": "color" }
    },
    "semantic": {
      "success": { "value": "#2D9F5B", "type": "color" },
      "warning": { "value": "#E5993E", "type": "color" },
      "danger":  { "value": "#D94F4F", "type": "color" }
    }
  },
  "spacing": {
    "sp1":  { "value": "4px" },  "sp2":  { "value": "8px" },
    "sp3":  { "value": "12px" }, "sp4":  { "value": "16px" },
    "sp6":  { "value": "24px" }, "sp8":  { "value": "32px" },
    "sp12": { "value": "48px" }, "sp16": { "value": "64px" },
    "sp24": { "value": "96px" }
  },
  "typography": {
    "fontEN":  { "value": "Lato, Trebuchet MS, Verdana, sans-serif" },
    "fontZH":  { "value": "Noto Sans TC, Microsoft JhengHei, sans-serif" },
    "fontMono":{ "value": "SF Mono, Fira Code, Consolas, monospace" }
  },
  "motion": {
    "easeEnter":  { "value": "cubic-bezier(0.25, 0.1, 0.25, 1.0)" },
    "easeExit":   { "value": "cubic-bezier(0.22, 0.61, 0.36, 1)" },
    "easeSettle": { "value": "cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1)" },
    "durReveal":  { "value": "400ms" },
    "durCascade": { "value": "350ms" },
    "durPulse":   { "value": "600ms" },
    "durSettle":  { "value": "500ms" }
  },
  "breakpoint": {
    "sm":  { "value": "420px" },
    "md":  { "value": "768px" },
    "lg":  { "value": "1024px" },
    "xl":  { "value": "1280px" }
  },
  "radius": {
    "sm": { "value": "4px" },
    "md": { "value": "6px" },
    "lg": { "value": "8px" },
    "xl": { "value": "12px" }
  }
}

Tailwind ConfigTailwind 設定

// tailwind.config.js — GPS Brand Extension
module.exports = {
  theme: {
    extend: {
      colors: {
        turquoise: { 50:'#F0FAFB', 100:'#D4F1F3', 200:'#A8E3E8', 300:'#6DCDD5', 400:'#3DB9C2', 500:'#26A7B0', 600:'#1E8A92', 700:'#186E75', 800:'#145860', 900:'#0F4249', 950:'#082A30' },
        copper:    { 50:'#F8F7F9', 100:'#EDEAF1', 200:'#DDD8E5', 300:'#CAC3D2', 400:'#B3A9C2', 500:'#9B8FA8', 600:'#857693', 700:'#6E5F7C', 800:'#574A63', 900:'#41374B', 950:'#2B2433' },
        gps: { purple:'#8C9FCB', green:'#8CC897', orange:'#F6AD90', black:'#0A1A22', ink:'#1A2A32' }
      },
      fontFamily: {
        en: ['Lato','Trebuchet MS','Verdana','sans-serif'],
        zh: ['Noto Sans TC','Microsoft JhengHei','sans-serif'],
        mono: ['SF Mono','Fira Code','Consolas','monospace']
      },
      spacing: { 'sp-1':'4px','sp-2':'8px','sp-3':'12px','sp-4':'16px','sp-6':'24px','sp-8':'32px','sp-12':'48px','sp-16':'64px','sp-24':'96px' },
      transitionTimingFunction: {
        'gps-enter':'cubic-bezier(0.25,0.1,0.25,1)',
        'gps-exit':'cubic-bezier(0.22,0.61,0.36,1)',
        'gps-settle':'cubic-bezier(0.16,1,0.3,1)'
      }
    }
  }
}

SCSS VariablesSCSS 變數

// _gps-tokens.scss
$turquoise: #26A7B0;  $copper: #CAC3D2;
$purple: #8C9FCB;     $green: #8CC897;    $orange: #F6AD90;
$black: #0A1A22;      $ink: #1A2A32;      $white: #FAFBFC;
$success: #2D9F5B;    $warning: #E5993E;  $danger: #D94F4F;
$font-en: 'Lato','Trebuchet MS',Verdana,sans-serif;
$font-zh: 'Noto Sans TC','Microsoft JhengHei',sans-serif;
$sp: (1:4px, 2:8px, 3:12px, 4:16px, 6:24px, 8:32px, 12:48px, 16:64px, 24:96px);
$bp-sm:420px; $bp-md:768px; $bp-lg:1024px; $bp-xl:1280px;

Responsive Breakpoints響應式斷點

All GPS digital products must use these breakpoints for consistency across dashboards, portals, and web applications.

所有 GPS 數位產品必須使用這些斷點，以確保儀表板、入口網站和網頁應用的一致性。

TokenpxTarget目標Columns欄數
$bp-sm420pxSmall phones小型手機4
$bp-md768pxTablets, large phones平板、大型手機8
$bp-lg1024pxLaptops, small desktops筆電、小型桌機12
$bp-xl1280pxLarge desktops, signage panels大型桌機、看板面板12
Appendix V附錄 V
Version History & Changelog版本紀錄與變更日誌
Owner: GPS Strategy & DX
Version版本Date日期Changes變更內容Approved By核准者
v3.02026 Q2Mega Portal merge — combined Brand Standards (v1.0) + Brand Bible Supreme (v2.0) into single portal. Added: Crisis Comms protocol, Brand Evolution governance, Bilingual canonical example, Brand Violation remediation pathway, Version History. Corrected: RACI row (03–11), Lato weight spec, owner tags on all chapters.Mega Portal 合併——將品牌標準 (v1.0) + 品牌聖經至尊版 (v2.0) 合併為單一入口網站。新增：危機溝通協議、品牌演進治理、雙語正式範例、品牌違規處理流程、版本紀錄。修正：RACI 列 (03–11)、Lato 字重規格、所有章節負責人標注。GPS Director
v2.02026 Q1Brand Bible Supreme — expanded color universe (60+ tokens, 11-step scales), print/digital/motion applications, creative variations (6 campaign moods, 7 seasonal), dark mode, accessibility pairings.品牌聖經至尊版——擴展色彩系統（60+ 代符、11 階色階）、印刷/數位/動態應用、創意變體（6 種宣傳情緒、7 種季節變體）、深色模式、無障礙配對。GPS Strategy
v1.02026 Q1Initial Brand Standards Portal — 13 chapters + Appendix A. Foundation, Visual Identity, Expression, Application, Governance, New Site Activation Playbook, Language Architecture, RACI.初版品牌標準入口——13 章 + 附錄 A。基礎、視覺識別、表達、應用、治理、新廠區品牌啟動手冊、語言架構、RACI。GPS Strategy
Change governance:變更治理：Minor corrections (typos, token values) are logged and published by GPS Strategy without approval. Structural changes (new chapters, pillar additions, logo modifications) require GPS Director sign-off. All versions are archived and accessible. Regional teams must verify they reference the current version before producing new materials.小幅修正（錯字、代符值）由 GPS 策略團隊記錄並發布，無需核准。結構性變更（新章節、支柱新增、標誌修改）需 GPS Director 簽核。所有版本皆歸檔並可存取。區域團隊在製作新材料前，必須確認參照的是最新版本。
